name: Adrenaline
description: Increases turret damage when the tank is severely damaged. Adds a spare battery for the enhanced damage modulator, activated only in extreme circumstances when the tank's hull is critically damaged. Powering the damage modulator from two energy sources is unsafe — it may explode. The requirement to activate it only during severe damage likely exists to avoid warranty claims.
disadvantages: Damage bonus only activates when health is ≤35%
Effect is disabled when the tank has the Freezing status effect.
descriptionZh: 当坦克严重受损时，会增加炮塔伤害。为增强型伤害调制器添加备用电池，仅在坦克车体严重损坏的极端情况下激活。使用两种能源为损伤调制器供电是不安全的——它可能会爆炸。仅在严重损坏时才激活它的要求可能是为了避免保修索赔。

name: Camper
description: Increases turret damage when the tank has minimal damage. A spare battery for the enhanced damage modulator, connected in parallel to the primary power source via an AI-controlled management system. This system safely boosts turret damage beyond the modulator’s standard capabilities, but only if the tank’s structural integrity remains intact. If the AI detects that the hull has been compromised, the spare battery will immediately shut down — all to prevent warranty claims, of course.
disadvantages: Damage boost is active only while you have at least 50% of your maximum HP.
Effect is disabled when the tank has the Freezing status effect.
descriptionZh: 当坦克伤害最小时增加炮塔伤害。用于增强型损伤调制器的备用电池，通过人工智能控制的管理系统并联到主电源。该系统可以安全地提高炮塔损坏程度，使其超出调制器的标准能力，但前提是坦克的结构完整性保持完好。如果人工智能检测到船体受到损害，备用电池将立即关闭——当然，所有这些都是为了防止保修索赔。

name: Compact Fuel Tanks
description: Perfect for lovers of «ignite and run» tactics: it ignites opponents faster but expends more fuel.
descriptionZh: 非常适合“点燃并逃跑”战术的爱好者：它可以更快地点燃对手，但消耗更多的燃料。

name: Critical Mix
description: Сritical damage and critical hit chance have been increased. Adds a critical mixture into the igniting agent. The damage caused by such a mixture is significantly higher than with a conventional ignition. When assembling the augment, engineers made a mistake in the proportions of the mixtures, as a result, critical damage is dealt much more often than was planned when developing this modification.
descriptionZh: 暴击伤害和暴击几率已增加。将关键混合物添加到点火剂中。这种混合物造成的损害明显高于传统点火。在组装增强件时，工程师在混合物的比例上犯了错误，因此，造成严重伤害的次数比开发此修改时计划的要多得多。

name: Excelsior
description: Enhances key turret or hull parameters without introducing new functions. This premium augment is the result of a breakthrough research program integrating diamond crystals into the turret’s design. Diamond-coated barrel lining increases operational pressure during fire. Diamond bearings enhance turret’s rotation efficiency. Diamond semiconductors boost the targeting system’s computational performance. The only downside? Its stunning craftsmanship remains hidden from view inside the turret.
descriptionZh: 在不引入新功能的情况下增强关键炮塔或车体参数。这种高级增强是一项突破性研究计划的结果，该计划将金刚石晶体融入到炮塔的设计中。金刚石涂层枪管内衬增加了火灾期间的操作压力。金刚石轴承提高了刀塔的旋转效率。金刚石半导体提高了瞄准系统的计算性能。唯一的缺点？其令人惊叹的工艺仍然隐藏在炮塔内。

name: High-Pressure Pump
description: Improved hit distance for mid-range targets: the stream of fire will shoot slightly further, and maximum hit distance is increased. Requires a more precise aiming.
descriptionZh: 提高了中距离目标的命中距离：火流射程会稍微远一些，最大命中距离也会增加。需要更精确的瞄准。

name: Incendiary Mix
description: Thermite mixture will burn through tank armor, dealing increased damage, but without igniting the target. No heating effect.
descriptionZh: 铝热剂混合物会烧穿坦克装甲，造成更大的伤害，但不会点燃目标。无加热效果。

name: Jamming Mix
description: Adds an electrostatic mixture into the igniting agent. A critical concentration of the mixture may stop the target from activating its Overdrive or use their Drone for a short time, but critical damage and heating rate are decreased.
advantages: Critically hitting the enemy activates the Jammer status effect for 3 seconds
descriptionZh: 将静电混合物添加到点火剂中。混合物的临界浓度可能会阻止目标激活其超速驱动或在短时间内使用其无人机，但临界伤害和加热速率会降低。

name: Magnetic Mix
description: Adds a magnetic mixture into the igniting agent. A critical concentration of the mixture may cause the target's supplies to be deactivated, but critical damage and heating rate are decreased.
advantages: Critically hitting the enemy activates the Electromagnetic Pulse status effect for 1 second
descriptionZh: 将磁性混合物添加到点火剂中。混合物的临界浓度可能会导致目标的供应被停用，但临界损害和加热速率会降低。

name: Paralyzing Mix
description: Adds a paralyzing mixture into the igniting agent. A critical concentration of the mixture may cause all of the target's systems to be paralyzed, but critical damage and heating rate are decreased.
advantages: Critical hits Stun the enemy for 0.4 seconds
descriptionZh: 将麻痹混合物添加到点火剂中。混合物的临界浓度可能会导致目标的所有系统瘫痪，但临界损害和加热速率会降低。

name: Phoenix
description: Only tankers who keep rising like a phoenix from the ashes again and again to achieve their goal deserve this weapon. A secret augment. Earn 5 000 000 reputation points using the Firebird turret to get it.
descriptionZh: 只有那些像凤凰一样浴火重生、一次次实现目标的坦克手才配得上这把武器。秘密增强。使用火鸟炮塔获得 5 000 000 声望点即可获得它。

name: Pulsar
description: An augment made with irreproducible technology. A critical hit generates a quantum vortex that applies several effects at the same time, usually negative ones. Scientists managed to decrease critical damage and critical chance, but it was not enough to salvage the situation — an enemy will still be sorely defeated once struck. The inventor of the technology is on the international most wanted list.
advantages: Hitting an enemy with a critical shot will apply the following status effects: Jammer : 3 sec Electromagnetic Pulse : 1 sec Stun : 0.4 sec Armor-Piercing : 1.5 sec
descriptionZh: 用不可复制的技术制成的增强体。致命一击会产生量子漩涡，同时产生多种效果，通常是负面效果。科学家们设法降低了暴击伤害和暴击几率，但这还不足以挽救局面——敌人一旦被击中，仍然会被惨败。该技术的发明者名列国际通缉名单上。

name: Toxic Mix
description: Adds a toxic mixture into the igniting agent. A critical concentration of the mixture may cause the target to lose their armor for a short time, but critical damage and heating rate are decreased.
advantages: Critically hitting the enemy activates the Armor-Piercing status effect for 1.5 seconds
descriptionZh: 将有毒混合物添加到点火剂中。混合物达到临界浓度可能会导致目标短时间内失去护甲，但临界伤害和加热速率会降低。

name: Corrosive Mix
description: Swapping cooling agent with acid mixture, which eats through even the most sturdy armor in mere seconds. No freezing effect.
descriptionZh: 用酸性混合物交换冷却剂，即使是最坚固的装甲也会在短短几秒钟内被腐蚀。无冷冻效果。

name: Critical Mix
description: Critical hit chance is increased. Freezing power is in turn decreased. Adds a critical mixture into the freezing agent. When assembling the augment, engineers made a mistake in the proportions of the mixtures, and as a result, critical damage is dealt much more often than it was planned when developing this modification. But there is also the reverse effect - the proportion of refrigerant has drastically declined.
descriptionZh: 暴击几率增加。冷冻能力依次降低。将关键混合物添加到冷冻剂中。在组装增强件时，工程师在混合物的比例上犯了错误，因此造成严重伤害的频率比开发此修改时计划的要高得多。但也有相反的效果——制冷剂的比例急剧下降。

name: Shock Freeze
description: Quickly and effectively turns tanks into solid and immobile pieces of ice. Due to limited space in the turret, several battle mechanisms had to be removed, resulting in reduced damage.
descriptionZh: 快速有效地将储罐变成坚固且不可移动的冰块。由于炮塔内的空间有限，一些战斗装置必须被拆除，从而导致伤害减少。

name: Stable Mix
description: Freezing effect is decreased, but range of attack and energy reserve are significantly increased. This augment turns your turret into a tactical control tool. By weakening the freezing effect, it gives you an extended range and more energy, allowing you to easily keep enemies at a safe distance. With it, damage remains stable over long distances, and your combat effectiveness increases significantly.
descriptionZh: 冰冻效果降低，但攻击范围和能量储备显着增加。此增强功能可将您的炮塔变成战术控制工具。通过削弱冰冻效果，它可以为你提供更远的范围和更多的能量，让你轻松地将敌人保持在安全距离。有了它，远距离伤害保持稳定，战斗力大幅提升。

name: Toxic Mix
description: Swaps the cooling agent with toxic mixture. A critical concentration of the mixture may cause the target not being able to use their armor for a short time, but critical damage and freezing rate are decreased.
advantages: Critically hitting an enemy will apply the Armor-Piercing status effect to them for 1.5 seconds
descriptionZh: 将冷却剂更换为有毒混合物。混合物达到临界浓度可能会导致目标短时间内无法使用护甲，但临界伤害和冰冻率会降低。

Adds a spare battery for the enhanced damage modulator, activated only in extreme circumstances when the tank's hull is critically damaged. Powering the damage modulator from two energy sources is unsafe — it may explode. The requirement to activate it only during severe damage likely exists to avoid warranty claims.
disadvantages: Damage bonus only activates when health is ≤20%
Effect is disabled when the tank has the Freezing status effect.

name: Armor-Piercing Salvo
description: Critical damage and salvo shots apply the Armor-Piercing status effect to the enemy tank. The projectile's special polarization destroys the target's armor on salvo and critical hits. Due to a special armor-piercing projectile type, the effect spreads to other tanks in the affected area. On salvo shots, the duration of the «Armor-piercing» status effect is increased.
advantages: Sniping an enemy will apply the Armor-Piercing status effect to them and all enemies within a 15 meter radius for 9 seconds.
Critically hitting an enemy will apply the Armor-Piercing status effect to them for 5 seconds.
descriptionZh: 暴击伤害和齐射会对敌方坦克施加穿甲状态效果。射弹的特殊极化会在齐射和重击时摧毁目标的装甲。由于特殊的穿甲弹类型，效果会蔓延到受影响区域的其他坦克。齐射时，“穿甲”状态效果的持续时间会增加。

name: Boxer
description: Salvo impact force and arcade impact force are increased. Aiming and reload takes more time. Each blast from this augment delivers a punch-like impact to enemy armor. The Boxer can forcibly spin enemy tanks, severely disrupting their ability to return fire.
descriptionZh: 齐射冲击力和街机冲击力增加。瞄准和装弹需要更多时间。这种增强的每次爆炸都会对敌人的装甲产生类似拳击的冲击力。拳击手可以强行旋转敌方坦克，严重破坏他们的还击能力。

name: Camper
description: Increases turret damage when the tank has minimal damage. A spare battery for the enhanced damage modulator, connected in parallel to the primary power source via an AI-controlled management system. This system safely boosts turret damage beyond the modulator’s standard capabilities, but only if the tank’s structural integrity remains intact. If the AI detects that the hull has been compromised, the spare battery will immediately shut down — all to prevent warranty claims, of course.
disadvantages: Damage boost is active only while you have at least 95% of your maximum HP.
Effect is disabled when the tank has the Freezing status effect.

name: Electromagnetic Salvo
description: Critical damage and salvo shots apply the EMP status effect to the enemy tank. When an enemy tank is hit by the electromagnetic salvo or critical damage, its supplies are deactivated. Due to a special EMP projectile type, the effect spreads to other tanks in the affected area. On salvo shots, the duration of the «EMP» status effect is increased.
advantages: Sniping an enemy will apply the Electromagnetic Pulse status effect to them and all enemies within a 15 meter radius for 3 seconds.
Critically hitting an enemy will apply the Electromagnetic Pulse status effect to them for 2 seconds.
descriptionZh: 暴击伤害和齐射会对敌方坦克施加电磁脉冲状态效果。当敌方坦克受到电磁齐射或严重伤害时，其补给就会被停用。由于特殊的电磁脉冲射弹类型，其效果会扩散到受影响区域的其他坦克。齐射时，“EMP”状态效果的持续时间会增加。

name: Excelsior
description: Enhances key turret or hull parameters without introducing new functions. This premium augment is the result of a breakthrough research program integrating diamond crystals into the turret’s design. Diamond-coated barrel lining increases operational pressure during fire. Diamond bearings enhance turret’s rotation efficiency. Diamond semiconductors boost the targeting system’s computational performance. The only downside? Its stunning craftsmanship remains hidden from view inside the turret.

name: Faster Horizontal Tracking
description: Accelerates turret rotation speed and increases vertical aiming angle. Snipers aren't usually equipped with powerful guidance systems, because the targets are normally far away. But if the enemy decides to fight up close, an increase in the vertical aiming angle and a faster turret rotation speed may give a critical advantage.
descriptionZh: 加快炮塔旋转速度并增加垂直瞄准角度。狙击手通常不会配备强大的制导系统，因为目标通常很远。但如果敌人决定近距离战斗，增加垂直瞄准角度和更快的炮塔旋转速度可能会带来关键优势。

name: Freezing Salvo
description: Critical damage freezes the target. Salvo shots can freeze multiple targets. Projectiles contain a cryogenic core. In addition to effectively freezing individual enemies, it's possible to freeze many more of them by a well-timed salvo shot.
advantages: Sniping an enemy will lower the temperature of all enemies within a 15 meter radius by -1.0.
Critically hitting an enemy will lower their temperature by -1.0.
descriptionZh: 致命伤害会冻结目标。齐射可以冻结多个目标。射弹包含低温核心。除了有效地冻结单个敌人之外，还可以通过适时的齐射来冻结更多敌人。

name: Hacked Aiming Processor
description: Significantly increases the time that you remain locked onto a target when it moves out of sight. The default settings are always chosen without much imagination. The targeting system will release its target lock if it cannot securely maintain contact with the target. For those who do not know how to select targets, this augment simplifies the locking process. But for those who do know, this little hack will come in handy and let you decide whether to hold or change the target.
descriptionZh: 当目标移出视线时，显着增加您保持锁定目标的时间。总是选择默认设置，没有太多想象力。如果目标系统无法安全地与目标保持联系，它将释放其目标锁定。对于那些不知道如何选择目标的人来说，这一增强简化了锁定过程。但对于那些知道的人来说，这个小窍门会派上用场，让你决定是保留还是改变目标。

name: Hyperspeed Shells
description: Arcade mode damage dealt increases proportionally with the distance from the target, instead of decreased. Close-range damage is greatly reduced. Sniper mode damage is not affected by this augment. Guided projectiles with incredible power, dealing more damage as the distance increases. The explosion of such a projectile near your own tank can be deadly, and to prevent this, projectile speed is significantly increased, and a special system limits the damage dealt until the projectile travels far from your tank.
descriptionZh: 街机模式造成的伤害随着距目标的距离成比例增加，而不是减少。近距离伤害大大降低。狙击模式伤害不受此增强的影响。具有令人难以置信的威力的制导射弹，随着距离的增加造成更多的伤害。这种射弹在你自己的坦克附近爆炸可能是致命的，为了防止这种情况，射弹速度显着增加，并且特殊的系统限制造成的伤害，直到射弹远离你的坦克。

name: Incendiary Salvo
description: Critical damage sets the target on fire. Salvo shots can set multiple targets on fire. Projectiles with an incendiary core allow you to burn the enemies alive. Launching a salvo shot increases the effective radius of the incendiary mixture and allows you to set fire to multiple targets at once.
advantages: Sniping an enemy will raise the temperature of all enemies within a 15 meter radius by +0.40.
Critically hitting an enemy will raise their temperature by 0.40.
descriptionZh: 严重伤害会使目标着火。齐射可以使多个目标着火。带有燃烧核心的射弹可以让你活活烧死敌人。发射齐射会增加燃烧混合物的有效半径，并允许您同时点燃多个目标。

name: Jamming Salvo
description: Any damage dealt applies the Jamming status effect to the enemy tank. Projectiles contain aluminum powder in the core. Upon hitting the enemy, they prevent the use of overdrives and drones for a short period of time.
advantages: Hitting an enemy will apply the Jammer status effect to them for 3 seconds.
Sniping an enemy will apply the Jammer status effect to all enemies hit for 12 seconds.
Critically hitting an enemy will apply the Jammer status effect to them for 9 seconds
descriptionZh: 造成的任何伤害都会对敌方坦克施加干扰状态效果。弹丸的核心含有铝粉。击中敌人后，它们会在短时间内阻止超速驾驶和无人机的使用。

name: Large Caliber
description: Increased damage and reload speed of regular shots. Simple conversion for those who prefer larger calibers over shooting quickly. The caliber increase does not affect the salvo shots.
descriptionZh: 提高常规射击的伤害和装弹速度。对于那些喜欢大口径而不是快速射击的人来说，可以进行简单的转换。口径增加不会影响齐射。

name: Nemesis
description: Salvo mode damage is increased, but aiming takes more time and shot recoil is increased. The goddess of retribution had a hand in creating this augment. With it, you will be able to punish your ill-wishers and destroy them on the battlefield with one salvo. May the blood of enemies freeze in their veins the moment they see you!
descriptionZh: 齐射模式伤害增加，但瞄准需要更多时间并且射击后坐力增加。报应女神参与了这个增强的创造。有了它，你就可以惩罚那些不怀好意的人，并在战场上一举消灭他们。愿敌人看到你的那一刻，血管里的血液就凝固了！

name: Phoenix
description: Only tankers who keep rising like a phoenix from the ashes again and again to achieve their goal deserve this weapon. A secret augment. Earn 5 000 000 reputation points using the Gauss turret to get it.
descriptionZh: 只有那些像凤凰一样浴火重生、一次次实现目标的坦克手才配得上这把武器。秘密增强。使用高斯炮塔获得 5 000 000 声望点即可获得它。

name: Pulsar
description: An augment made with irreproducible technology. A critical hit generates a quantum vortex that applies several effects at the same time, usually negative ones. Scientists managed to decrease critical damage, but it was not enough to salvage the situation — an enemy will still be sorely defeated once struck. The inventor of the technology is on the international most wanted list.
advantages: Hitting an enemy with a critical shot will apply the following status effects: Jammer : 9 sec Electromagnetic Pulse : 1 sec Stun : 0.4 sec Armor-Piercing : 5 sec
descriptionZh: 用不可复制的技术制成的增强体。致命一击会产生量子漩涡，同时产生多种效果，通常是负面效果。科学家们设法减少了致命伤害，但这还不足以挽救局面——敌人一旦被击中，仍然会被惨败。该技术的发明者名列国际通缉名单上。

name: Solenoid Cooling
description: Accelerated reload and aiming time of salvo shots, but the salvo deals significantly less damage. Advanced cooling systems make it possible to achieve high rate of salvo fire. With such high rate of fire, boosters accumulate less energy and the projectile deals less damage, but it definitely opens up the possibility for oppressing the enemy at a long distance.
descriptionZh: 加速齐射射击的装填和瞄准时间，但齐射造成的伤害明显减少。先进的冷却系统使得实现高齐射率成为可能。在如此高的射速下，助推器积聚的能量较少，射弹造成的伤害也较少，但它无疑为远距离压制敌人提供了可能性。

name: Stunning Salvo
description: Critical damage and salvo shots apply the Stun status effect to the enemy tank. Due to special types of missiles that emit ultrasound, it is possible to immobilize an opponent, leaving them unable to shoot, activate overdrives and supplies, or self-destruct for some time.
advantages: Sniping an enemy will apply the Stun status effect to all enemies hit for 1.5 seconds.
Critically hitting an enemy will apply the Stun status effect to them for 1 seconds
descriptionZh: 暴击伤害和齐射会对敌方坦克施加眩晕状态效果。由于发射超声波的特殊类型导弹，可以使对手无法动弹，使其在一段时间内无法射击、激活超速装置和补给，或自毁。

name: Super Solenoids
description: A salvo deals much more damage but only one target is affected. Improved inductance coils welded to a turret increase projectile speed. Kinetic impact momentarily evaporates projectiles. A target receives more damage, but explosives fail to detonate.
descriptionZh: 齐射会造成更多伤害，但只有一个目标受到影响。改进的电感线圈焊接到炮塔上，提高了射弹速度。动能冲击会瞬间蒸发射弹。目标受到更多伤害，但炸药无法引爆。

name: Adaptive Reload
description: Destroying an enemy fully reloads the clip. Shot reload takes less time. Clip reload takes longer if you don't destroy an enemy. Instant refill of the current ammo clip after destroying an enemy and decreased shot reload time. With enough luck you can pump out kills with factory efficiency. Otherwise, you'll have to contend with an empty ammo clip for a long time.
advantages: Destroying an enemy reloads the clip
descriptionZh: 完全消灭敌人会重新加载剪辑。射击重新装填所需的时间更少。如果你不消灭敌人，弹夹重新加载需要更长的时间。消灭敌人后立即重新填充当前弹药夹并减少射击重新加载时间。如果运气足够好，你可以以工厂效率大量杀戮。否则，你将不得不长时间与空弹夹作斗争。

name: Adrenaline
description: Increases turret damage when the tank is severely damaged. Adds a spare battery for the enhanced damage modulator, activated only in extreme circumstances when the tank's hull is critically damaged. Powering the damage modulator from two energy sources is unsafe — it may explode. The requirement to activate it only during severe damage likely exists to avoid warranty claims.
disadvantages: Damage bonus only activates when health is ≤35%
Effect is disabled when the tank has the Freezing status effect.
descriptionZh: 当坦克严重受损时，会增加炮塔伤害。为增强型伤害调制器添加备用电池，仅在坦克车体严重损坏的极端情况下激活。使用两种能源为损伤调制器供电是不安全的——它可能会爆炸。仅在严重损坏时才激活它的要求可能是为了避免保修索赔。

name: Armor-Piercing Shot
description: A perfect farewell gift. Сritical shots will destroy the armor of any tank which has been hit. The target is left defenseless.
advantages: Critically hitting an enemy will apply the Armor-Piercing status effect to them for 3 seconds.
descriptionZh: 完美的告别礼物。致命射击会摧毁任何被击中的坦克的装甲。目标处于无防御状态。

name: Assault Magazine
description: Assault version of Hammer, designed for audacious and risky attacks: the turret shoots very fast, just like a rifle. In a heated battle, rapid reloading of magazines is very essential. Therefore, to optimize this process, both the critical damage and impact force are reduced.
descriptionZh: Hammer 的突击版，专为大胆而危险的攻击而设计：炮塔射击速度非常快，就像步枪一样。在激烈的战斗中，弹匣的快速装弹非常重要。因此，为了优化该过程，需要降低临界损坏和冲击力。

name: Blunderbuss
description: Regular and critical damage are increased. Critical damage chance and firing angles are also increased due to increased number of pellets per shot. The number of shots in the magazine has been reduced to just one, but this single shot packs a powerful punch - regular and critical damage are increased. However, the bullet spread is also increased, but with a lucky and skilled maneuver, you can blow away several enemies in one shot.
descriptionZh: 常规伤害和严重伤害都会增加。由于每次射击的弹丸数量增加，致命伤害几率和射击角度也会增加。弹匣中的子弹数量已减少到只有一发，但这一发子弹却具有强大的冲击力 - 常规伤害和致命伤害都会增加。然而，子弹的散布也增加了，但凭借幸运和熟练的机动，你可以一枪轰掉几个敌人。

name: Boxer
description: A single shot per clip, but the impact force is significantly boosted. Each blast from this augment delivers a punch-like impact to enemy armor. The Boxer can forcibly spin enemy tanks, severely disrupting their ability to return fire.
descriptionZh: 每个弹夹一次射击，但冲击力显着增强。这种增强的每次爆炸都会对敌人的装甲产生类似拳击的冲击力。拳击手可以强行旋转敌方坦克，严重破坏他们的还击能力。

name: Camper
description: Increases turret damage when the tank has minimal damage. A spare battery for the enhanced damage modulator, connected in parallel to the primary power source via an AI-controlled management system. This system safely boosts turret damage beyond the modulator’s standard capabilities, but only if the tank’s structural integrity remains intact. If the AI detects that the hull has been compromised, the spare battery will immediately shut down — all to prevent warranty claims, of course.
disadvantages: Damage boost is active only while you have at least 50% of your maximum HP.
Effect is disabled when the tank has the Freezing status effect.
descriptionZh: 当坦克伤害最小时增加炮塔伤害。用于增强型损伤调制器的备用电池，通过人工智能控制的管理系统并联到主电源。该系统可以安全地提高炮塔损坏程度，使其超出调制器的标准能力，但前提是坦克的结构完整性保持完好。如果人工智能检测到船体受到损害，备用电池将立即关闭——当然，所有这些都是为了防止保修索赔。

name: Dragon's Breath
description: Features pellets with the striking name of «Dragon's Breath» that ignite enemy tanks on critical shots. Only a fire extinguisher will help here!
advantages: Critically hitting an enemy raises their temperature by +0.4.
descriptionZh: 具有引人注目的名称“龙息”的弹丸，可在关键射击时点燃敌方坦克。这里只有灭火器可以帮忙！

name: Duplet
description: The clip holds only two shots. The reload time between shots is decreased, while the clip reload time is increased. Impact force is reduced. Replacement of the internal construction of the turret with an adaptive mechanism from a classic double-barrelled shotgun. Allows the user to rapidly fire 2 shots, with almost no delay, but the clip reload takes more time, and the impact force is reduced. Ideal for quickly eliminating enemies with low durability.
descriptionZh: 该剪辑仅包含两个镜头。镜头之间的重新加载时间减少，而剪辑重新加载时间增加。冲击力减小。用经典双管霰弹枪的自适应机构替换了炮塔的内部结构。允许用户快速射击2发，几乎没有延迟，但弹夹重新装弹需要更多时间，并且冲击力降低。非常适合快速消灭耐久度较低的敌人。

name: Excelsior
description: Enhances key turret or hull parameters without introducing new functions. This premium augment is the result of a breakthrough research program integrating diamond crystals into the turret’s design. Diamond-coated barrel lining increases operational pressure during fire. Diamond bearings enhance turret’s rotation efficiency. Diamond semiconductors boost the targeting system’s computational performance. The only downside? Its stunning craftsmanship remains hidden from view inside the turret.
descriptionZh: 在不引入新功能的情况下增强关键炮塔或车体参数。这种高级增强是一项突破性研究计划的结果，该计划将金刚石晶体融入到炮塔的设计中。金刚石涂层枪管内衬增加了火灾期间的操作压力。金刚石轴承提高了刀塔的旋转效率。金刚石半导体提高了瞄准系统的计算性能。唯一的缺点？其令人惊叹的工艺仍然隐藏在炮塔内。

name: Heavy Slugger
description: Increased range of minimum and maximum damage. Decreased horizontal spread, rotation speed, and impact force. Hammer gets equipped with some special secret elements that let it significantly increase the range of damage and reduce the horizontal spread. However, this powerful addition significantly increases the weight of the turret and thus the rotation speed is decreased.
advantages: Range of minimum damage: +100% Highlighting range: +100%
descriptionZh: 增加了最小和最大伤害的范围。减少水平扩散、旋转速度和冲击力。锤子配备了一些特殊的秘密元素，可以显着增加伤害范围并减少水平传播。然而，这种强大的附加功能显着增加了炮塔的重量，从而降低了转速。

name: High-Capacity Ammo Clip
description: Special permanently fixed ammo clip for 5 projectiles, included in standard equipment for assault tanks.
descriptionZh: 用于 5 枚射弹的特殊永久固定弹药夹，包含在突击坦克的标准装备中。

name: Hunter Duplet
description: Two quick shots in the clip and increased range of fire. Horizontal pellet spread and impact force are decreased but clip reload takes a bit more time. A special version of Duplet. You still have two accurate shots followed by a prolonged reload. However, thanks to the fact that the barrel hasn't had to be shortened, range of fire is increased compared to the standard modification. With such a double-barreled gun you can go hunting. See an enemy? Boldly pull the trigger.
advantages: Range of minimum damage: +100% Highlighting range: +100%
descriptionZh: 剪辑中的两次快速射击并增加了射程。弹丸水平扩散和冲击力减少，但弹夹重新装弹需要更多时间。 Duplet 的特殊版本。你仍然可以进行两次准确的射击，然后进行长时间的重新装填。然而，由于枪管不必缩短，因此与标准修改相比，射程有所增加。有了这样的双管枪，你就可以去打猎了。看到敌人了吗？大胆地扣动扳机。

name: Jamming Shot
description: Each shot in the ammo clip contains a special casing that prevents an enemy tank from using its drone or overdrive for a short time.
advantages: Hitting an enemy will apply the Jammer status effect to them for 3 seconds.
descriptionZh: 弹药夹中的每发子弹都包含一个特殊的外壳，可以防止敌方坦克在短时间内使用无人机或超速行驶。

name: Large Caliber Pellets
description: Regular and critical damage are increased. Reload takes longer. Each shot in the clip deals increased damage to an enemy. However, to compensate for the energy released, it takes more time to reload.
descriptionZh: 常规伤害和严重伤害都会增加。重新加载需要更长的时间。剪辑中的每次射击都会对敌人造成更大的伤害。然而，为了补偿释放的能量，重新加载需要更多的时间。

name: Magnetic Pellets
description: A powerful blend of strength and strategy - magnetized pellets disable the activated supplies of hit enemies, but only critical shots will have this magnetizing effect.
advantages: Critically hitting an enemy will apply the Electromagnetic Pulse status effect to them for 1 second.
descriptionZh: 力量与策略的强大结合 - 磁化弹丸会禁用被击中敌人的激活补给，但只有关键射击才会具有这种磁化效果。

name: Needle Gun
description: Transforms the turret from shotgun into a long-range needle gun with limited ammunition and slower clip reload. A radical change to the turret’s ammunition and Hammer’s way of usage. Shrapnel shot is replaced with an armor-piercing subcaliber needle. Such needles have significantly higher range and accuracy, and their compactness allows an increase in the number of shots per clip and faster shot reload. Unfortunately, just like with the standard version of the turret, the clip can only be reloaded after fully emptying it. Due to the limited ammunition and long clip reload, it is recommended to fire in short bursts to avoid leaving too many needles in already destroyed enemy tanks.
descriptionZh: 将炮塔从霰弹枪转变为远程针枪，弹药有限，弹夹装弹速度较慢。炮塔的弹药和锤子的使用方式发生了根本性的变化。弹片射击被替换为小口径穿甲针。这种针具有明显更高的射程和精度，并且其紧凑性可以增加每个弹夹的射击数量和更快的射击重新加载。不幸的是，就像标准版本的炮塔一样，弹夹只能在完全清空后才能重新装弹。由于弹药有限且弹夹装填时间较长，建议短时间连发射击，以避免在已被摧毁的敌方坦克上留下太多针头。

name: Phoenix
description: Only tankers who keep rising like a phoenix from the ashes again and again to achieve their goal deserve this weapon. A secret augment. Earn 5 000 000 reputation points using the Hammer turret to get it.
descriptionZh: 只有那些像凤凰一样浴火重生、一次次实现目标的坦克手才配得上这把武器。秘密增强。使用锤子炮塔获得 5 000 000 点声望点即可获得它。

name: Pulsar
description: An augment made with irreproducible technology. A critical hit generates a quantum vortex that applies several effects at the same time, usually negative ones. Scientists managed to decrease critical damage, but it was not enough to salvage the situation — an enemy will still be sorely defeated once struck. The inventor of the technology is on the international most wanted list.
advantages: Hitting an enemy with a critical shot will apply the following status effects: Jammer : 3 sec Electromagnetic Pulse : 1 sec Stun : 0.8 sec Armor-Piercing : 3 sec
descriptionZh: 用不可复制的技术制成的增强体。致命一击会产生量子漩涡，同时产生多种效果，通常是负面效果。科学家们设法减少了致命伤害，但这还不足以挽救局面——敌人一旦被击中，仍然会被惨败。该技术的发明者名列国际通缉名单上。

name: Revolver
description: The augment has six shots in the clip. Every third shot deals critical damage. The time for reloading the clip is increased, but the time between shots is reduced. Feel like a Wild West cowboy, show your individuality and survival skills, spin the drum of your revolver, and let your opponents fear your unexpected critical shot that leads to respawning.
advantages: Every third shot deals critical damage.
descriptionZh: 剪辑中有六个镜头。每第三次射击都会造成严重伤害。重新加载剪辑的时间增加了，但射击之间的时间减少了。感觉像一个狂野的西部牛仔，展示你的个性和生存技能，旋转你的左轮手枪，让你的对手害怕你意外的致命一击，从而导致重生。

name: Slugger
description: Range of fire is increased, but impact force and scatter angles are reduced. Increased pellet density allows you to hit ranged targets better. However, the impact force is decreased. Keeping their distance will no longer help your enemies.
advantages: Range of minimum damage: +50% Highlighting range: +25%
descriptionZh: 射程增加，但冲击力和散射角度减小。增加的颗粒密度可以让您更好地击中远程目标。然而，冲击力减小。保持距离将不再对你的敌人有帮助。

name: Stunning Pellets
description: The best choice for defending your base from attacks by fast tanks. Critical shots stun every target hit by the pellets.
advantages: Critically hitting an enemy will apply the Stun status effect to them for 0.8 seconds.
descriptionZh: 保卫基地免受快速坦克攻击的最佳选择。致命一击会击晕所有被弹丸击中的目标。

name: Wyvern's Breath
description: Features pellets by the striking name of «Wyvern's Breath», an improved version of the well-known «Dragon's Breath». Instead of igniting enemy tanks, it leaves them frozen in their tracks on critical shots.
advantages: Critically hitting an enemy lowers their temperature by -1.00.
descriptionZh: 其特点是具有引人注目的名称“双足飞龙之息”的颗粒，这是著名的“龙息”的改进版本。它不会点燃敌方坦克，而是让他们在关键射击时冻结在轨道上。

name: Ap Immunity
description: Protects from armor-piercing effect.
descriptionZh: 防止穿甲效果。

name: Blaster
description: Explodes on death.
advantages: Chaos damage on death depending on hull weight
descriptionZh: 死亡时爆炸。

name: Cold Immunity
description: Makes your tank immune to freeze effects.
descriptionZh: 使你的坦克免疫冰冻效果。

name: Cold Resistance
description: Partially protects your tank from the effect of cold, making it harder to slow down. Does not affect direct damage from Freeze.
descriptionZh: 部分保护您的坦克免受寒冷的影响，使其更难减速。不影响冰冻造成的直接伤害。

name: Driver
description: Increases overdrive charge speed.
descriptionZh: 提高超速充电速度。

name: Emp Immunity
description: Makes your tank immune to EMP.
advantages: Provides complete immunity from Electromagnetic Pulse
descriptionZh: 使您的坦克免受 EMP 影响。

name: Engineer
description: A good engineer can patch armor on the go.
advantages: Picking up a supply box adds 1000 HP
descriptionZh: 一名优秀的工程师可以随时随地修补装甲。

name: Excelsior
description: Enhances hull parameters.
descriptionZh: 增强船体参数。

name: Extreme Lightweight Construction
description: Extremely lightweight hull construction.
descriptionZh: 极其轻质的船体结构。

name: Grenadier
description: Grenade reload no longer requires respawn.
descriptionZh: 手榴弹重装不再需要重生。

name: Heat Immunity
description: Makes your tank immune to heat damage.
descriptionZh: 使您的坦克免受热损伤。

name: Heat Resistance
description: Partially protects your tank from the damage and effects of heat, making it harder to burn. Does not affect direct damage from Firebird.
descriptionZh: 部分保护您的水箱免受热损坏和影响，使其更难燃烧。不影响火鸟的直接伤害。

name: Heavyweight Construction
description: Significantly increases your hull's weight.
descriptionZh: 显着增加你的船体重量。

name: Jammer Immunity
description: Prevents jammer effect.
descriptionZh: 防止干扰效应。

name: Lifeguard
description: Prevents destruction once per respawn.
descriptionZh: 每次重生时防止破坏一次。

name: Lightweight Construction
description: Significantly decreases your hull's weight.
descriptionZh: 显着减轻船体重量。

name: Miner
description: Mines remain after death.
descriptionZh: 死后地雷仍然存在。

name: Phoenix
description: Provides multiple immunities.
advantages: Immunity from jammer, emp, stun, ap
descriptionZh: 提供多重免疫力。

name: Special Protection
description: A special kind of protection used in special scenarios.
descriptionZh: 特殊场景下使用的特殊保护。

name: Stun Immunity
description: Prevents enemies from stunning you.
descriptionZh: 防止敌人击晕你。

name: Yamato
description: Significantly increases damage and reduces the fire rate of the turret. Installation of the high-caliber “Yamato” cannon into the Thunder turret turns every shot into a solemn event. The heavy cannon significantly slows down reload and turret turning speed. However, you can penetrate the armor of a battleship with one shot. This cannon must be treated with maximum attention and respect, adapting the usage tactic.
descriptionZh: 显着增加伤害并降低炮塔的射速。雷霆炮塔安装大口径“大和”加农炮，让每一次射击都变得庄严。重型火炮显着减慢了装填和炮塔转动速度。然而，你可以一枪击穿战列舰的装甲。必须以最大程度的关注和尊重来对待这门大炮，并调整使用策略。

name: Adrenaline
description: Increases turret damage when the tank is severely damaged. Adds a spare battery for the enhanced damage modulator, activated only in extreme circumstances when the tank's hull is critically damaged. Powering the damage modulator from two energy sources is unsafe — it may explode. The requirement to activate it only during severe damage likely exists to avoid warranty claims.
disadvantages: Damage bonus only activates when health is ≤35%
Effect is disabled when the tank has the Freezing status effect.
descriptionZh: 当坦克严重受损时，会增加炮塔伤害。为增强型伤害调制器添加备用电池，仅在坦克车体严重损坏的极端情况下激活。使用两种能源为损伤调制器供电是不安全的——它可能会爆炸。仅在严重损坏时才激活它的要求可能是为了避免保修索赔。

name: Broadband Radiators
description: Broadband radiators with a shortened range for easier aiming.
descriptionZh: 宽带辐射器的射程较短，更容易瞄准。

name: Camper
description: Increases turret damage when the tank has minimal damage. A spare battery for the enhanced damage modulator, connected in parallel to the primary power source via an AI-controlled management system. This system safely boosts turret damage beyond the modulator’s standard capabilities, but only if the tank’s structural integrity remains intact. If the AI detects that the hull has been compromised, the spare battery will immediately shut down — all to prevent warranty claims, of course.
disadvantages: Damage boost is active only while you have at least 50% of your maximum HP.
Effect is disabled when the tank has the Freezing status effect.
descriptionZh: 当坦克伤害最小时增加炮塔伤害。用于增强型损伤调制器的备用电池，通过人工智能控制的管理系统并联到主电源。该系统可以安全地提高炮塔损坏程度，使其超出调制器的标准能力，但前提是坦克的结构完整性保持完好。如果人工智能检测到船体受到损害，备用电池将立即关闭——当然，所有这些都是为了防止保修索赔。

name: Excelsior
description: Enhances key turret or hull parameters without introducing new functions. This premium augment is the result of a breakthrough research program integrating diamond crystals into the turret’s design. Diamond-coated barrel lining increases operational pressure during fire. Diamond bearings enhance turret’s rotation efficiency. Diamond semiconductors boost the targeting system’s computational performance. The only downside? Its stunning craftsmanship remains hidden from view inside the turret.
descriptionZh: 在不引入新功能的情况下增强关键炮塔或车体参数。这种高级增强是一项突破性研究计划的结果，该计划将金刚石晶体融入到炮塔的设计中。金刚石涂层枪管内衬增加了火灾期间的操作压力。金刚石轴承提高了刀塔的旋转效率。金刚石半导体提高了瞄准系统的计算性能。唯一的缺点？其令人惊叹的工艺仍然隐藏在炮塔内。

name: Jamming Nanobots
description: А part of the destroyer-nanobots was equipped with radio modules. This doesn't affect healing teammates but will surprise an opponent. After climbing inside the opponent tank's mechanisms, nanobots start to cause interference blocking the opponent's access to use overdrive, disabling their drone and boost of supplies for some time.
advantages: Critically hitting an enemy activates the Jammer effect for 3 seconds
descriptionZh: 驱逐舰纳米机器人的一部分配备了无线电模块。这不会影响治疗队友，但会让对手大吃一惊。爬入对手坦克的机械装置后，纳米机器人开始造成干扰，阻止对手使用超速装置，在一段时间内禁用他们的无人机和补给。

name: Magnetic Nanobots
description: Critical damage applies the EMP status effect to the enemy tank for a short time. А part of the destroyer-nanobots was magnetized. This doesn't affect healing teammates but will surprise the opponent. After climbing inside the opponent tank's mechanisms, nanobots disable and block the opponent's access to supplies for some time.
advantages: Critically hitting an enemy activates the Electromagnetic Pulse effect for 1.5 seconds
descriptionZh: 暴击伤害会在短时间内对敌方坦克施加电磁脉冲状态效果。驱逐舰纳米机器人的一部分被磁化了。这不会影响治疗队友，但会让对手大吃一惊。爬入对手坦克的机械装置后，纳米机器人会在一段时间内禁用并阻止对手获取补给。

name: Nanomass Reactor
description: After receiving the signal that target was destroyed, reactor converts the collected nanomass and recharges energy levels of the turret. Operational converter noticeably increases radiators' energy consumption.
descriptionZh: 在收到目标被摧毁的信号后，反应堆将收集到的纳米质量转化为炮塔的能量水平。运行转换器显着增加了散热器的能耗。

name: Phoenix
description: Only tankers who keep rising like a phoenix from the ashes again and again to achieve their goal deserve this weapon. A secret augment. Earn 5 000 000 reputation points using the Isida turret to get it.
descriptionZh: 只有那些像凤凰一样浴火重生、一次次实现目标的坦克手才配得上这把武器。秘密增强。使用伊西达炮塔获得 5,000,000 声望点即可获得它。

name: Pulsar
description: An augment made with irreproducible technology. A critical hit generates a quantum vortex that applies several effects at the same time, usually negative ones. Scientists managed to decrease critical damage and critical chance, but it was not enough to salvage the situation — an enemy will still be sorely defeated once struck. The inventor of the technology is on the international most wanted list.
advantages: Hitting an enemy with a critical shot will apply the following status effects: Jammer : 3 sec Electromagnetic Pulse : 1 sec Stun : 0.4 sec Armor-Piercing : 1.5 sec
descriptionZh: 用不可复制的技术制成的增强体。致命一击会产生量子漩涡，同时产生多种效果，通常是负面效果。科学家们设法降低了暴击伤害和暴击几率，但这还不足以挽救局面——敌人一旦被击中，仍然会被惨败。该技术的发明者名列国际通缉名单上。

name: Shock Nanobot Injection
description: Increases the damage dealt by the teammate you are healing. Healing takes more time. Repair mode has been supplemented with an enhancement: nanobots transported to the allied tank will intellectually affect the firing system of the tank and increase its damage in addition to repairing armor.
advantages: Increases an ally's damage while healing: +25%
descriptionZh: 增加你正在治疗的队友所造成的伤害。治愈需要更多时间。修复模式得到了增强：运送到盟军坦克的纳米机器人除了修复装甲之外，还会对坦克的射击系统产生智力影响并增加其伤害。

name: Stunning Nanobots
description: Critical damage applies the «Stun» status effect to the enemy tank for a short time. А part of the destroyer-nanobots were equipped with ultrasonic modules. This doesn't affect teammates while healing but will surely surprise the opponent. After climbing inside the enemy tank's mechanisms, nanobots render the tank unable to shoot, activate overdrives and supplies, or self-destruct for some time.
advantages: Critically hitting an enemy activates the Stun effect for 0.4 seconds
descriptionZh: 暴击伤害会对敌方坦克施加短暂的“眩晕”状态效果。部分驱逐舰纳米机器人配备了超声波模块。这在治疗时不会影响队友，但肯定会让对手大吃一惊。爬入敌方坦克的机械装置后，纳米机器人会使坦克在一段时间内无法射击、激活超速装置和补给，或自毁。

name: Support Nanobots
description: Part of the destroyer-nanobots were reconfigured into a repair mode. Improved healing in exchange for lower damage.
descriptionZh: 部分驱逐舰纳米机器人被重新配置为修复模式。提高治疗效果以换取更低的伤害。

name: Sustainable Nanobots
description: When healing, less energy is consumed, but more is spent during attacks. Increased effective range, but reduced horizontal aiming angle. The updated nanobot firmware significantly enhances ally support efficiency. During tank healing, the augment reduces energy consumption by optimizing the damage restoration process. However, during attack phases, energy consumption noticeably increases. These microscopic bots are also equipped with special technology that provides extraordinary beam stability. Their resistance to external influences allows for increased range and precision.
descriptionZh: 治疗时消耗的能量较少，但攻击时消耗的能量较多。有效射程增加，但水平瞄准角度减小。更新后的纳米机器人固件显着提高了盟友的支持效率。在坦克修复过程中，增强功能通过优化伤害恢复过程来减少能量消耗。然而，在攻击阶段，能量消耗明显增加。这些微型机器人还配备了特殊技术，可提供非凡的光束稳定性。它们对外部影响的抵抗力可以增加范围和精度。

name: Toxic Nanobots
description: Critical damage applies the «Armor-Piercing» status effect to an opponent. But in turn, the critical damage is significantly decreased. А part of the destroyer-nanobots contains toxic compounds. This doesn't affect healing teammates but will be an unpleasant surprise for the opponent. After climbing inside the opponent tank's mechanisms, nanobots start to leak toxic fluids that deactivate the enemy’s means of protection for some time.
advantages: Critically hitting an enemy activates the Armor-Piercing effect for 1.5 seconds
descriptionZh: 暴击伤害会对对手施加“穿甲”状态效果。但反过来，暴击伤害却显着降低。驱逐舰纳米机器人的一部分含有有毒化合物。这不会影响治疗队友，但会给对手带来不愉快的惊喜。爬入对手坦克的机械装置后，纳米机器人开始泄漏有毒液体，使敌人的防护手段失效一段时间。

name: Vampire Nanobots
description: It will be impossible to effectively heal allies with this augment, but it becomes possible to heal yourself! Healing efficiency is low, but it will be possible to survive a moment longer in a close combat fight and win. Critical damage is removed.
advantages: Recovers HP at a rate of 35% of your base damage per tick while beam is on an enemy. Healing rate is not affected by protection, supplies, or status effects.
descriptionZh: 使用此增强功能不可能有效地治愈盟友，但可以治愈自己！治疗效率较低，但在近身格斗中可以多存活片刻并取得胜利。严重伤害被移除。

name: Adrenaline
description: Increases turret damage when the tank is severely damaged. Adds a spare battery for the enhanced damage modulator, activated only in extreme circumstances when the tank's hull is critically damaged. Powering the damage modulator from two energy sources is unsafe — it may explode. The requirement to activate it only during severe damage likely exists to avoid warranty claims.
disadvantages: Damage bonus only activates when health is ≤20%
Effect is disabled when the tank has the Freezing status effect.
descriptionZh: 当坦克严重受损时，会增加炮塔伤害。为增强型伤害调制器添加备用电池，仅在坦克车体严重损坏的极端情况下激活。使用两种能源为损伤调制器供电是不安全的——它可能会爆炸。仅在严重损坏时才激活它的要求可能是为了避免保修索赔。

name: Armor-Piercing Core
description: Critical shot destroys the armors of all targets caught in the explosion radius. Highly explosive projectile supplied by an armor-piercing core. On explosion, the projectile disperses explosive elements, making the enemies lose their armor and deactivating any defense mechanisms mounted on the tank.
advantages: On a critical hit, applies the Armor-Piercing status effect for 9 seconds.
descriptionZh: 致命一击会摧毁爆炸半径内所有目标的装甲。由穿甲核心提供的高爆炸弹。爆炸时，射弹会分散爆炸元素，使敌人失去装甲并停用坦克上安装的任何防御装置。

name: Automated Gunpowder Loading Mechanism
description: Converts the turret rotation mechanism to the mechanism of changing the elevation angle and makes power accumulation faster. At the same time it becomes harder to avoid overshooting or undershooting due to not having the required level of power
descriptionZh: 将炮塔旋转机构转换为改变仰角机构，使动力积累更快。同时，由于不具备所需的功率水平，避免过冲或下冲变得更加困难

name: Bombard
description: Minimum and initial angles of the turret are 45 degrees. Minimum and maximum projectile speeds are reduced. Reloading and charging shots are significantly accelerated. With this augment, Magnum becomes a powerful weapon for firing from behind cover. It is impossible to shoot directly ahead — your turret is always at an angle of 45 degrees or more. This design allows you to effectively hit enemies hiding behind cover, thanks to the trajectory of projectiles. Reduced shot power improves control over the shot trajectory, and reduced reload time allows for quick and constant fire, creating a real "rain" of shells.
descriptionZh: 炮塔的最小角度和初始角度为 45 度。最小和最大射弹速度降低。装弹和蓄力射击显着加快。有了这个增强，Magnum 成为了从掩体后面射击的强大武器。直接向前射击是不可能的——你的炮塔总是处于 45 度或更大的角度。由于射弹的轨迹，这种设计可以让你有效地击中隐藏在掩体后面的敌人。降低射击威力可以改善对射击轨迹的控制，缩短装弹时间可以实现快速、持续的射击，从而形成真正的炮弹“雨”。

name: Camper
description: Increases turret damage when the tank has minimal damage. A spare battery for the enhanced damage modulator, connected in parallel to the primary power source via an AI-controlled management system. This system safely boosts turret damage beyond the modulator’s standard capabilities, but only if the tank’s structural integrity remains intact. If the AI detects that the hull has been compromised, the spare battery will immediately shut down — all to prevent warranty claims, of course.
disadvantages: Damage boost is active only while you have at least 95% of your maximum HP.
Effect is disabled when the tank has the Freezing status effect.
descriptionZh: 当坦克伤害最小时增加炮塔伤害。用于增强型损伤调制器的备用电池，通过人工智能控制的管理系统并联到主电源。该系统可以安全地提高炮塔损坏程度，使其超出调制器的标准能力，但前提是坦克的结构完整性保持完好。如果人工智能检测到船体受到损害，备用电池将立即关闭——当然，所有这些都是为了防止保修索赔。

name: Carronade
description: Increases the turret’s rate of fire at the cost of reduced damage per shot. Shells used by this version of Magnum feature a smaller explosive charge, saving a significant amount of weight. This results in a higher rate of fire, smoother recoil, faster aiming, and a much higher density of fire. The “Carronade” performs noticeably better at close range compared to the standard Magnum. On the other hand, firing the “Carronade” at maximum range is more demanding and requires greater skill from the shooter.
descriptionZh: 提高炮塔的射速，但会降低每次射击的伤害。此版本 Magnum 使用的炮弹具有较小的炸药量，从而显着减轻了重量。这导致更高的射速、更平稳的后坐力、更快的瞄准以及更高的火力密度。与标准 Magnum 相比，“Carronade”在近距离的表现明显更好。另一方面，在最大射程内发射“大口径短炮”的要求更高，并且需要射手更高的技巧。

name: Destroyer
description: Regular and critical damage are increased. Impact, explosion force, and recoil force are also increased. Reload takes longer. Turret rotation speed, projectile speed, and explosion radius are decreased. The augment turns the turret into a real siege artillery capable of crushing an enemy with one shot. Projectiles become incredibly powerful! But as you know, with great power comes great responsibility. You have to pay for powerful heavy projectiles with a long reload time. Be careful between volleys!
descriptionZh: 常规伤害和严重伤害都会增加。冲击力、爆炸力和反冲力也增加。重新加载需要更长的时间。炮塔旋转速度、弹丸速度和爆炸半径降低。增强后的炮塔变成了真正的攻城火炮，能够一炮粉碎敌人。射弹变得异常强大！但如您所知，权力越大，责任越大。你必须为重装时间长的强大重型射弹付出代价。截击之间要小心！

name: Excelsior
description: Enhances key turret or hull parameters without introducing new functions. This premium augment is the result of a breakthrough research program integrating diamond crystals into the turret’s design. Diamond-coated barrel lining increases operational pressure during fire. Diamond bearings enhance turret’s rotation efficiency. Diamond semiconductors boost the targeting system’s computational performance. The only downside? Its stunning craftsmanship remains hidden from view inside the turret.
descriptionZh: 在不引入新功能的情况下增强关键炮塔或车体参数。这种高级增强是一项突破性研究计划的结果，该计划将金刚石晶体融入到炮塔的设计中。金刚石涂层枪管内衬增加了火灾期间的操作压力。金刚石轴承提高了刀塔的旋转效率。金刚石半导体提高了瞄准系统的计算性能。唯一的缺点？其令人惊叹的工艺仍然隐藏在炮塔内。

name: Freezing Core
description: Critical shots apply the «Freezing» status effect to all targets caught in the explosion radius. Highly explosive projectile supplied by a freezing core. On explosion, the projectile lets you slow down the movement of the enemy on the battlefield with critical damage, and also almost weld their turret to the hull for some time.
advantages: Critical hits apply the Freezing status effect to all enemies within a 10 meter radius from the point of impact for 10 seconds.
descriptionZh: 致命一击会对爆炸半径内的所有目标施加“冻结”状态效果。由冷冻核心提供的高爆炸性射弹。爆炸时，射弹可以让你在战场上减慢敌人的移动速度并造成严重伤害，并且在一段时间内几乎将他们的炮塔焊接到车体上。

name: Harpoon
description: It changes the shot angle to 1°, turning Magnum from artillery into an analog of a regular turret. Splash damage, amplification time, and critical damage radius are reduced, while reload time and projectile speed are increased. A Magnum modification that allows you to play with a fixed vertical angle. Control the turret like any other one. Get the powerful turret in the style of medieval artillery.
disadvantages: Minimum, average, maximum and critical splash damage radiuses: -60%
descriptionZh: 它将射击角度更改为 1°，将 Magnum 从火炮变成了普通炮塔的类似物。溅射伤害、放大时间和临界伤害半径减少，而装弹时间和射弹速度增加。 Magnum 修改版允许您以固定的垂直角度进行游戏。像控制其他炮塔一样控制炮塔。获得中世纪火炮风格的强大炮塔。

name: Incendiary Core
description: Critical shot burns all the targets caught in the explosion radius. High-explosive projectile supplied by an incendiary core. On explosion, the projectile disperses incendiary elements around, burning enemy tanks. The enemy needs a team of firemen to stop such a fire rain.
advantages: Critical hits (10m radius from explosion) raise the temperature of all damaged enemy tanks by +1.
descriptionZh: 致命一击会烧毁爆炸半径内的所有目标。由燃烧芯提供的高爆射弹。爆炸时，射弹会向周围散布燃烧元素，燃烧敌方坦克。敌人需要一队消防员来阻止这样的火雨。

name: Jamming Core
description: Each shot applies the «Jammer» status effect to all targets caught in the explosion radius. With critical hits, the duration of the effect increases. A highly explosive projectile supplied by a core with emitters of interference. Upon detonation, it causes interference, thus blocking the opponent's access to activate their overdrive and disabling their drone and boost of supplies for some time.
advantages: Applies the Jammer status effect to all enemies within a 10 meter radius from the point of impact for 6 seconds.
Critical hits apply the Jammer status effect for 10 seconds.
descriptionZh: 每次射击都会对爆炸半径内的所有目标施加“干扰器”状态效果。暴击后，效果的持续时间会增加。一种高爆炸弹，由带有干扰发射器的核心提供。爆炸后，它会造成干扰，从而阻止对手激活超速驾驶并在一段时间内禁用他们的无人机和补给。

name: Magnetic Core
description: Critical shot applies the «EMP» status effect to all targets caught in the explosion radius. A highly explosive projectile supplied by an electromagnetic core. Upon detonation, it causes a brief shutdown of the enemy tanks' electronics, deactivating supplies for some time.
advantages: Critical hits (10m radius from explosion) apply the Electromagnetic Pulse status effect for 3 seconds.
descriptionZh: 致命一击会对爆炸半径内的所有目标施加“EMP”状态效果。由电磁核心提供的高爆炸性射弹。爆炸后，它会导致敌方坦克的电子设备短暂关闭，使补给中断一段时间。

name: Mortar
description: Vertical aiming mode. If a shot doesn't hit any tank, a mine is placed at a point of impact. Critical splash damage radius is decreased. Converts the turret rotation mechanism to the mechanism of changing the elevation angle and fires mines instead of shells. When hitting a tank the mine explodes, and when it misses, the mine remains at the spot where it landed, meaning somebody can drive onto it.
advantages: Lay mines when a tank is not hit (mine lifetime 120 seconds)
descriptionZh: 垂直瞄准模式。如果射击没有击中任何坦克，则会在弹着点处放置地雷。临界飞溅伤害半径减小。将炮塔旋转机构改为改变仰角机构，发射地雷而非炮弹。当地雷击中坦克时，它会爆炸，而当它未命中时，地雷仍停留在它着陆的地方，这意味着有人可以开到它上面。

name: Phoenix
description: Only tankers who keep rising like a phoenix from the ashes again and again to achieve their goal deserve this weapon. A secret augment. Earn 5 000 000 reputation points using the Magnum turret to get it.
descriptionZh: 只有那些像凤凰一样浴火重生、一次次实现目标的坦克手才配得上这把武器。秘密增强。使用 Magnum 炮塔获得 5 000 000 点声望点即可获得它。

name: Pulsar
description: An augment made with irreproducible technology. A critical hit generates a quantum vortex that applies several effects at the same time, usually negative ones. Scientists managed to decrease critical damage, but it was not enough to salvage the situation — an enemy will still be sorely defeated once struck. The inventor of the technology is on the international most wanted list.
advantages: Hitting an enemy with a critical shot will apply the following status effects: Jammer : 12 sec Electromagnetic Pulse : 3 sec Stun : 1.5 sec Armor-Piercing : 9 sec
descriptionZh: 用不可复制的技术制成的增强体。致命一击会产生量子漩涡，同时产生多种效果，通常是负面效果。科学家们设法减少了致命伤害，但这还不足以挽救局面——敌人一旦被击中，仍然会被惨败。该技术的发明者名列国际通缉名单上。

name: Reinforced Gun Carriage
description: Converts the turret rotation mechanism to the mechanism of changing the elevation angle. It becomes possible to lower or raise the gun barrel but the only way to rotate your turret horizontally is by rotating your hull.
descriptionZh: 将炮塔旋转机构转换为改变仰角的机构。可以降低或升高炮管，但水平旋转炮塔的唯一方法是旋转船体。

name: Stunning Core
description: Critical damage applies the «Stun» status effect to the enemy tank for a short time. A highly explosive projectile supplied by an ultrasonic core. Upon detonation, it immobilizes the opponent, leaving them unable to shoot, activate overdrives and supplies, or self-destruct for some time.
advantages: Critical hits (10m radius from explosion) apply the Stun status effect for 1.5 seconds.
descriptionZh: 暴击伤害会对敌方坦克施加短暂的“眩晕”状态效果。由超声波核心提供的高爆炸弹。爆炸后，它会使对手动弹不得，使他们在一段时间内无法射击、激活超速装置和补给，或自毁。

name: Vacuum Core
description: The further a target is from the epicenter of the explosion, the more damage it receives. Direct hit damage is decreased. High-explosive projectile supplied by a vacuum core. Nobody knows what’s inside this core. The inventor says it is the purest form of liquid vacuum. Whatever it is, an explosion of such a shell deals more damage the further a target is from the epicenter of the explosion, but damage dealt by a direct hit is decreased.
advantages: Radius of average splash damage: 15 m
descriptionZh: 目标距离爆炸中心越远，受到的伤害就越大。直接伤害减少。由真空核心提供的高爆弹丸。没有人知道这个核心里面有什么。发明者说这是最纯粹的液体真空形式。不管是什么，目标距离爆炸中心越远，这种炮弹的爆炸造成的伤害就越大，但直接命中造成的伤害会降低。

name: Adrenaline
description: Increases turret damage when the tank is severely damaged. Adds a spare battery for the enhanced damage modulator, activated only in extreme circumstances when the tank's hull is critically damaged. Powering the damage modulator from two energy sources is unsafe — it may explode. The requirement to activate it only during severe damage likely exists to avoid warranty claims.
disadvantages: Damage bonus only activates when health is ≤20%
Effect is disabled when the tank has the Freezing status effect.
descriptionZh: 当坦克严重受损时，会增加炮塔伤害。为增强型伤害调制器添加备用电池，仅在坦克车体严重损坏的极端情况下激活。使用两种能源为损伤调制器供电是不安全的——它可能会爆炸。仅在严重损坏时才激活它的要求可能是为了避免保修索赔。

name: Camper
description: Increases turret damage when the tank has minimal damage. A spare battery for the enhanced damage modulator, connected in parallel to the primary power source via an AI-controlled management system. This system safely boosts turret damage beyond the modulator’s standard capabilities, but only if the tank’s structural integrity remains intact. If the AI detects that the hull has been compromised, the spare battery will immediately shut down — all to prevent warranty claims, of course.
disadvantages: Damage boost is active only while you have at least 95% of your maximum HP.
Effect is disabled when the tank has the Freezing status effect.
descriptionZh: 当坦克伤害最小时增加炮塔伤害。用于增强型损伤调制器的备用电池，通过人工智能控制的管理系统并联到主电源。该系统可以安全地提高炮塔损坏程度，使其超出调制器的标准能力，但前提是坦克的结构完整性保持完好。如果人工智能检测到船体受到损害，备用电池将立即关闭——当然，所有这些都是为了防止保修索赔。

name: Cryo Rounds
description: A variant of Railgun with cryo-rounds. Each shot reduces the temperature of the targets that are hit by it.
advantages: Hitting an enemy lowers their temperature by -0.40.
Critically hitting an enemy lowers their temperature by -1.00.
descriptionZh: 带有低温弹的轨道炮的变体。每次射击都会降低被击中目标的温度。

name: Detonator
description: Significantly increases the damage and explostion radius of a Grenade in case of a combo shot. For the combo shot, you must hit your own Grenade with a Railgun shot. A successful combo detonation of a Grenade requires many conditions to align. The enemy must be at the right distance, the Grenade must be ready, and the turret must be charged. This rarely happens. It’s even rarer to successfully hit the Grenade to trigger the detonation. With this Augment, your efforts will be rewarded many times over. All you need is one successful hit. Just one successful hit and the enemy’s will shall be shattered.
advantages: Max. area damage radius of the grenade: +100%
Avg. area damage radius of the grenade: +100%
Min. area damage radius of the grenade: +30%
descriptionZh: 在连击时显着增加手榴弹的伤害和爆炸半径。对于组合射击，您必须用轨道炮射击击中自己的手榴弹。手榴弹的成功组合爆炸需要许多条件来配合。敌人必须处于正确的距离，手榴弹必须准备好，炮塔必须冲锋。这种情况很少发生。成功击中手榴弹并引发爆炸的情况更为罕见。有了这个增强功能，你的努力将得到数倍的回报。您所需要的只是一次成功的打击。只要一击成功，敌人的意志就会被粉碎。

name: Electromagnetic Accelerator «scout»
description: This modification will help you in dynamic one-on-one battles. The accelerated preparation for shots will create an unpleasant surprise for the enemy. Shot reload will take much less time. Regular and critical damage is reduced.
descriptionZh: 此修改将帮助您进行动态的一对一战斗。加速射击准备会给敌人带来不愉快的意外。射击重新装弹将花费更少的时间。常规和严重伤害减少。

name: Emp Rounds
description: When critical shots hit a tank, they apply the EMP status effect, disabling activated supplies. The effect doesn't last long.
advantages: Critically hitting an enemy applies the Electromagnetic Pulse status effect to them for 2 seconds.
descriptionZh: 当关键射击击中坦克时，它们会施加电磁脉冲状态效果，禁用激活的补给。效果不会持续很长时间。

name: Excalibur Rounds
description: Heavy duty critical damage. Critical hit chance increases with each subsequent shot. Upon hit, criticial hit chance resets. Shot warmup takes a bit more time. Your first shot after respawn always has a very low critical hit chance. If the first shot was not critical, the second shot has 50% critical hit chance. If the second shot was also not critical, the third shot has an almost guaranteed chance of dealing critical damage. Misses are also counted. The immense power of «Excalibur» rounds is achieved through the use of artificial intelligence that is so intelligent that it has its own character. Tankers who dealt with Excalibur describe this character as spoiled and even arrogant. Those few who are able to use Excalibur long enough to unlock its potential are considered among the tankers as kings, because only they have the willpower sufficient to counter the annoying shortcomings of Excalibur. One of these shortcomings is the lack of 100% chance to deal critical damage even after the fourth shot.
descriptionZh: 重型严重损坏。每次后续射击都会增加暴击率。命中后，暴击几率会重置。射击热身需要更多时间。重生后的第一次射击总是有非常低的暴击率。如果第一次射击没有造成致命一击，那么第二次射击就有 50% 的致命一击几率。如果第二次射击也不致命，那么第三次射击几乎肯定有机会造成致命伤害。未命中也被计算在内。 《Excalibur》子弹的巨大威力是通过使用人工智能来实现的，人工智能非常智能，具有自己的特点。与 Excalibur 打过交道的坦克手形容这个角色被宠坏了，甚至傲慢。那些能够使用Excalibur足够长的时间来释放其潜力的人被认为是坦克手中的国王，因为只有他们有足够的意志力来对抗Excalibur令人讨厌的缺点。这些缺点之一是即使在第四次射击后也缺乏 100% 的几率造成暴击伤害。

name: Excelsior
description: Enhances key turret or hull parameters without introducing new functions. This premium augment is the result of a breakthrough research program integrating diamond crystals into the turret’s design. Diamond-coated barrel lining increases operational pressure during fire. Diamond bearings enhance turret’s rotation efficiency. Diamond semiconductors boost the targeting system’s computational performance. The only downside? Its stunning craftsmanship remains hidden from view inside the turret.
descriptionZh: 在不引入新功能的情况下增强关键炮塔或车体参数。这种高级增强是一项突破性研究计划的结果，该计划将金刚石晶体融入到炮塔的设计中。金刚石涂层枪管内衬增加了火灾期间的操作压力。金刚石轴承提高了刀塔的旋转效率。金刚石半导体提高了瞄准系统的计算性能。唯一的缺点？其令人惊叹的工艺仍然隐藏在炮塔内。

name: Hyperspace Rounds
description: Upon hitting either allies or enemies, the damage increases based on the number of tanks the shot penetrates. Shot warmup time and impact force are decreased. No tank — be it an ally or an enemy, is an obstacle for these hyperspace rounds - it is simply another chance to accelerate. Efficiency of the turret with this augment is distance-dependent. Damage from such shells increases each time they penetrate a tank. Due to their properties, the rounds cannot push tanks, and critical damage is absent.
descriptionZh: 击中盟友或敌人后，伤害会根据射击穿透的坦克数量而增加。射击预热时间和冲击力减少。任何坦克——无论是盟友还是敌人，都不会成为这些超空间子弹的障碍——这只是另一个加速的机会。具有这种增强功能的炮塔的效率取决于距离。此类炮弹每次击穿坦克时造成的伤害都会增加。由于其特性，这些子弹无法推动坦克，并且不会造成严重伤害。

name: Hyperspeed Shells
description: The special aerodynamics of the projectile creates additional friction against the air, building up a concentration of static energy. Thus the amount of damage increases the further the shell flies from the tank.
descriptionZh: 弹丸的特殊空气动力学特性会产生额外的空气摩擦力，从而形成静态能量的集中。因此，炮弹距离坦克飞得越远，伤害量就越大。

name: Incendiary Rounds
description: Literally heats shells inside the barrel before shooting. Critical rounds set fire to the target.
advantages: Critically hitting an enemy raises their temperature by +0.40. A maximum of two tanks can be set on fire in this way at any given time.
descriptionZh: 从字面上看，在射击前加热枪管内的炮弹。关键弹会点燃目标。

name: Jamming Shells
description: Specialised shells are filled with aluminium-coated fibreglass. On successful hits, a small cloud is created that deactivates enemies’ overdrives.
advantages: Hitting an enemy applies the Jammer status effect to them for 9 seconds.
descriptionZh: 特殊的外壳填充有镀铝玻璃纤维。成功命中后，会产生一小团云，使敌人的超速运转失效。

name: Large Caliber Rounds
description: Damage and critical damage are increased. Reload takes a bit more time. Large caliber of this turret requires much more time for reloading and shot warmup but increases regular and critical damage.
descriptionZh: 伤害和暴击伤害增加。重新加载需要更多时间。该炮塔的大口径需要更多的时间来重新装弹和射击预热，但会增加常规和严重伤害。

name: Phoenix
description: Only tankers who keep rising like a phoenix from the ashes again and again to achieve their goal deserve this weapon. A secret augment. Earn 5 000 000 reputation points using the Railgun turret to get it.
descriptionZh: 只有那些像凤凰一样浴火重生、一次次实现目标的坦克手才配得上这把武器。秘密增强。使用轨道炮炮塔获得 5 000 000 点声望点即可获得它。

name: Pulsar
description: An augment made with irreproducible technology. A critical hit generates a quantum vortex that applies several effects at the same time, usually negative ones. Scientists managed to decrease critical damage and critical chance, but it was not enough to salvage the situation — an enemy will still be sorely defeated once struck. The inventor of the technology is on the international most wanted list.
advantages: Hitting an enemy with a critical shot will apply the following status effects: Jammer : 9 sec Electromagnetic Pulse : 2 sec Stun : 1 sec Armor-Piercing : 5 sec
descriptionZh: 用不可复制的技术制成的增强体。致命一击会产生量子漩涡，同时产生多种效果，通常是负面效果。科学家们设法降低了暴击伤害和暴击几率，但这还不足以挽救局面——敌人一旦被击中，仍然会被惨败。该技术的发明者名列国际通缉名单上。

name: Reinforced Aiming Transmission
description: Optimization of the aiming transmission for fast horizontal aim. Due to optimization, vertical aiming transmission is less effective. (N.B. The in game description is currently outdated; it has been reported.)
descriptionZh: 优化瞄准传输以实现快速水平瞄准。由于优化，垂直瞄准传输效果较差。 （注：游戏中的描述目前已过时；已报告。）

name: Round Destabilization
description: A handful of bolts and copper coils is inserted into the accelerator - with interesting results. This slight alteration adds even more chaos into the distribution of the final power of the shot. The critical damage is increased while the default damage is negligible.
descriptionZh: 将一些螺栓和铜线圈插入加速器中 - 产生了有趣的结果。这种轻微的改变给射击的最终力量的分配带来了更多的混乱。暴击伤害增加，而默认伤害可以忽略不计。

name: Round Stabilization
description: The aiming system computes a more predictable trajectory for shots, retaining power after piercing the target. Rounds always deal stable piercing damage regardless of distance or number of targets in a row.
descriptionZh: 瞄准系统计算出更可预测的射击轨迹，在击穿目标后保留力量。无论距离或连续目标数量如何，子弹始终会造成稳定的穿刺伤害。

name: Stun Rounds
description: An improved process of concentrating energy before firing allows critical hits to stun targets shot for a short time when they are hit. Lets you confuse opponents and assist in the defence of your base. Takes more time to heat up the barrel before shooting.
advantages: Critically hitting an enemy applies the Stun status effect to them for 1 second.
descriptionZh: 射击前集中能量的改进过程允许致命一击，使被击中的目标在短时间内昏迷。让你迷惑对手并协助保卫你的基地。射击前需要更多时间加热枪管。

name: Super Armor-Piercing Rounds
description: It is not enough to just pierce an enemy tank's armor — the enemy should remember this forever. Special rounds destroy armor for some time, long enough for one more fatal shot. Piercing the armor of multiple tanks in a row applies the AP effect to all of them.
advantages: Critically hitting an enemy will apply the Armor-Piercing status effect to them for 5 seconds.
descriptionZh: 仅仅刺穿敌方坦克的装甲是不够的——敌人应该永远记住这一点。特殊子弹会在一段时间内摧毁装甲，时间足以再进行一次致命射击。连续刺穿多辆坦克的装甲会对所有坦克施加 AP 效果。

name: «death Herald» Compulsator
description: Destroying an opponent fully reloads the turret. Reload and shot warmup takes less time. Bounty hunters will greatly appreciate this modification. «Death Herald»'s rate of fire is limited only by the shooter's ability to quickly choose targets.
advantages: Destroying an enemy fully reloads the turret
descriptionZh: 摧毁对手即可为炮塔重新装弹。重新装填和射击预热所需的时间更少。赏金猎人将会非常欣赏这一修改。 《死亡使者》的射速仅受限于射手快速选择目标的能力。

name: «shotgun» Rounds
description: Deals more damage up close than it does farther away. Standard damage is increased, while the range of fire is decreased. A perfect choice for those who want to fight their enemies head to head. Part of the projectile burns up inside the barrel, turning into a cloud of plasma able to deal huge amounts of damage up close. But the cloud quickly dissipates, in turn lowering the amount of damage dealt.
descriptionZh: 近距离造成的伤害比远距离造成的伤害更大。标准伤害增加，而射程减少。对于那些想要与敌人正面作战的人来说，这是一个完美的选择。部分射弹在枪管内燃烧，变成等离子体云，能够在近距离造成大量伤害。但云很快就会消散，从而降低造成的伤害。

name: Adrenaline
description: Increases turret damage when the tank is severely damaged. Adds a spare battery for the enhanced damage modulator, activated only in extreme circumstances when the tank's hull is critically damaged. Powering the damage modulator from two energy sources is unsafe — it may explode. The requirement to activate it only during severe damage likely exists to avoid warranty claims.
disadvantages: Damage bonus only activates when health is ≤25%
Effect is disabled when the tank has the Freezing status effect.
descriptionZh: 当坦克严重受损时，会增加炮塔伤害。为增强型伤害调制器添加备用电池，仅在坦克车体严重损坏的极端情况下激活。使用两种能源为损伤调制器供电是不安全的——它可能会爆炸。仅在严重损坏时才激活它的要求可能是为了避免保修索赔。

name: Berserk
description: Destroying an enemy refills the energy tank immediately. Reload takes less time, and energy tank is recharged faster. In this special assault mode, the turret's rate of fire is increased and as a result, it runs out of energy faster. However, each enemy tank destroyed refills the energy tank faster. Projectile's speed, regular, and critical damage are decreased.
advantages: Destroying an enemy refills the energy tank
descriptionZh: 消灭敌人会立即补充能量箱。重新加载所需的时间更少，并且能量箱的充电速度更快。在这种特殊的攻击模式下，炮塔的射速会增加，因此能量消耗得更快。然而，每辆被摧毁的敌方坦克都会更快地补充能量箱。射弹的速度、常规伤害和致命伤害都会降低。

name: Boxer
description: Impact force is significantly increased, and energy reload speed is accelerated. Projectile speed is significantly reduced, and gradually increases after the shot is fired. Each blast from this augment delivers a punch-like impact to enemy armor. The Boxer can forcibly spin enemy tanks, severely disrupting their ability to return fire.
descriptionZh: 冲击力显着增大，能量装填速度加快。弹丸速度显着降低，射击后逐渐增加。这种增强的每次爆炸都会对敌人的装甲产生类似拳击的冲击力。拳击手可以强行旋转敌方坦克，严重破坏他们的还击能力。

name: Camper
description: Increases turret damage when the tank has minimal damage. A spare battery for the enhanced damage modulator, connected in parallel to the primary power source via an AI-controlled management system. This system safely boosts turret damage beyond the modulator’s standard capabilities, but only if the tank’s structural integrity remains intact. If the AI detects that the hull has been compromised, the spare battery will immediately shut down — all to prevent warranty claims, of course.
disadvantages: Damage boost is active only while you have at least 85% of your maximum HP.
Effect is disabled when the tank has the Freezing status effect.
descriptionZh: 当坦克伤害最小时增加炮塔伤害。用于增强型损伤调制器的备用电池，通过人工智能控制的管理系统并联到主电源。该系统可以安全地提高炮塔损坏程度，使其超出调制器的标准能力，但前提是坦克的结构完整性保持完好。如果人工智能检测到船体受到损害，备用电池将立即关闭——当然，所有这些都是为了防止保修索赔。

name: Cryo Field
description: Instead of encapsulated plasma, the minus-field of this augment contains cryogen. Cryogen penetrates the target tank's armor and freezes the target on a critical hit.
advantages: Hitting an enemy with a critical shot lowers their temperature by -1.
descriptionZh: 这种增强的负场中含有冷冻剂，而不是封装的等离子体。冷冻剂穿透目标坦克的装甲并在重击时冻结目标。

name: Destabilized Plasma
description: Balls of unstable plasma disperse into clots after the slightest touch from any obstacle, hitting all enemies and the shooter themselves in a small radius.
advantages: Splash damage added: Minimum and critical splash damage radius: 7 m Average splash damage radius: 2 m Maximum splash damage radius: 1 m
Minimum and critical splash damage radius: 7 m
descriptionZh: 不稳定的等离子球在与任何障碍物最轻微的接触后就会分散成凝块，击中小半径内的所有敌人和射手本身。

name: Excelsior
description: Enhances key turret or hull parameters without introducing new functions. This premium augment is the result of a breakthrough research program integrating diamond crystals into the turret’s design. Diamond-coated barrel lining increases operational pressure during fire. Diamond bearings enhance turret’s rotation efficiency. Diamond semiconductors boost the targeting system’s computational performance. The only downside? Its stunning craftsmanship remains hidden from view inside the turret.
descriptionZh: 在不引入新功能的情况下增强关键炮塔或车体参数。这种高级增强是一项突破性研究计划的结果，该计划将金刚石晶体融入到炮塔的设计中。金刚石涂层枪管内衬增加了火灾期间的操作压力。金刚石轴承提高了刀塔的旋转效率。金刚石半导体提高了瞄准系统的计算性能。唯一的缺点？其令人惊叹的工艺仍然隐藏在炮塔内。

name: Helios
description: Sniper version of Ricochet. All the energy is used for a short but long-range burst of shots. Extremely effective at keeping enemies at bay, or setting up for an ambush.
descriptionZh: 狙击版的跳弹。所有能量都用于短距离但远距离的爆发射击。在阻止敌人或埋伏方面非常有效。

name: Jamming Field
description: With this augment, each hit on a target blocks its ability to use overdrive.
advantages: Hitting an enemy will apply the Jammer status effect to them for 1 second.
descriptionZh: 通过这种增强，每次击中目标都会阻止其使用超速驱动的能力。

name: Magnetron
description: The minus-field partially magnetizes the plasma, gaining the ability to disable the supplies of a target on a critical hit.
advantages: Hitting an enemy with a critical shot will apply the Electromagnetic Pulse status effect to them for 2 seconds.
descriptionZh: 负磁场部分磁化等离子体，从而能够在重击时禁用目标的电源。

name: Minus-Field Stabilization
description: Additional stabilization of the minus-field before each shot allows to fire effectively at a longer range. Projectiles travel further and faster, but the fire rate is reduced.
descriptionZh: 每次射击前负场的额外稳定性允许在更远的范围内有效射击。射弹飞行得更远更快，但射速会降低。

name: Phoenix
description: Only tankers who keep rising like a phoenix from the ashes again and again to achieve their goal deserve this weapon. A secret augment. Earn 5 000 000 reputation points using the Ricochet turret to get it.
descriptionZh: 只有那些像凤凰一样浴火重生、一次次实现目标的坦克手才配得上这把武器。秘密增强。使用跳弹炮塔获得 5 000 000 点声望点即可获得它。

name: Plasma Resonator
description: The further the target, the higher the damage, but damage is decreased and critical damage is removed. Using a special oscillatory system allows you to significantly increase energy of a plasma charge with the range of a shot. While a projectile flies, it becomes more and more powerful and is able to destroy the armor of even the most protected opponent. Do not forget about the main feature of the turret and shoot so that the projectile ricochets, thereby increasing the range of flight of the projectile, and hence the damage.
advantages: Damage percentage at the range of min. damage: 300%
descriptionZh: 目标越远，伤害越高，但伤害会减少，暴击伤害会被消除。使用特殊的振荡系统可以在射击范围内显着增加等离子体电荷的能量。当射弹飞行时，它会变得越来越强大，甚至能够摧毁最受保护的对手的装甲。不要忘记炮塔和射击的主要特征，使射弹跳弹，从而增加射弹的飞行范围，从而增加伤害。

name: Plasma-Torch
description: Regular damage, critical damage, projectile speed, range of fire, and impact force are decreased. However, less energy is consumed per shot, reload takes less time, and recoil is decreased. Modification that turns the turret into a short range plasmagun. Noticeably increases the rate of fire due to the radically reduced flying speed, range of fire, and damage of the projectiles. Unstable plasma also can't richochet more than once.
descriptionZh: 普通伤害、致命伤害、射弹速度、射程和冲击力都会降低。然而，每次射击消耗的能量更少，装填时间更短，并且后坐力也减少。将炮塔转变为短程等离子枪的改装。由于飞行速度、射程和射弹伤害大幅降低，射速显着增加。不稳定的等离子体也不能多次激发。

name: Pulsar
description: An augment made with irreproducible technology. A critical hit generates a quantum vortex that applies several effects at the same time, usually negative ones. Scientists managed to decrease critical damage, but it was not enough to salvage the situation — an enemy will still be sorely defeated once struck. The inventor of the technology is on the international most wanted list.
advantages: Hitting an enemy with a critical shot will apply the following status effects: Jammer : 1 sec Electromagnetic Pulse : 1 sec Stun : 0.4 sec Armor-Piercing : 3 sec
descriptionZh: 用不可复制的技术制成的增强体。致命一击会产生量子漩涡，同时产生多种效果，通常是负面效果。科学家们设法减少了致命伤害，但这还不足以挽救局面——敌人一旦被击中，仍然会被惨败。该技术的发明者名列国际通缉名单上。

name: Sizzling Field
description: An accurate destabilization of the minus-field leads to a small explosion of plasma on contact with a tank. The remains of the plasma will ignite the target on a critical hit.
advantages: Hitting an enemy with a critical shot raises their temperature by +0.5.
descriptionZh: 负场的精确不稳定会导致等离子体在与罐接触时发生小规模爆炸。等离子体的残余物会在重击时点燃目标。

name: Super-Smart Minus-Field
description: It is not entirely clear how the super-smart minus-field is smarter with this augment, but on a critical hit, rounds may pierce the enemy's armor, greatly reducing their chances of survival.
advantages: Hitting an enemy with a critical shot may apply the Armor-Piercing status effect to them for 5 seconds.
descriptionZh: 目前尚不完全清楚超级智能负力场如何通过这种增强变得更加智能，但在重击时，子弹可能会刺穿敌人的装甲，从而大大降低他们的生存机会。

name: Tectonic Field
description: An improved version of plasma lets you immobilize an opponent, leaving them unable to shoot, activate overdrives and supplies, or self-destruct for some time.
advantages: Hitting an enemy with a critical shot will apply the Stun status effect to them for 1 second.
descriptionZh: 等离子的改进版本可以让你固定对手，让他们在一段时间内无法射击、激活超速和补给，或者自毁。

name: Adrenaline
description: Increases turret damage when the tank is severely damaged. Adds a spare battery for the enhanced damage modulator, activated only in extreme circumstances when the tank's hull is critically damaged. Powering the damage modulator from two energy sources is unsafe — it may explode. The requirement to activate it only during severe damage likely exists to avoid warranty claims.
disadvantages: Damage bonus only activates when health is ≤20%
Effect is disabled when the tank has the Freezing status effect.
descriptionZh: 当坦克严重受损时，会增加炮塔伤害。为增强型伤害调制器添加备用电池，仅在坦克车体严重损坏的极端情况下激活。使用两种能源为损伤调制器供电是不安全的——它可能会爆炸。仅在严重损坏时才激活它的要求可能是为了避免保修索赔。

name: Armor-Piercing Shells
description: Artillery turret is equipped with special armor-piercing shells. A critical hit from the main turret destroys the target's armor, leaving them vulnerable.
advantages: Critical hits will apply the Armor-Piercing status effect to enemies for 10 seconds.
Rocket hits will apply the Armor-Piercing status effect to enemies for 1 second.
descriptionZh: 炮塔装有特殊的穿甲弹。主炮塔的致命一击会摧毁目标的装甲，使他们变得脆弱。

name: Camper
description: Increases turret damage when the tank has minimal damage. A spare battery for the enhanced damage modulator, connected in parallel to the primary power source via an AI-controlled management system. This system safely boosts turret damage beyond the modulator’s standard capabilities, but only if the tank’s structural integrity remains intact. If the AI detects that the hull has been compromised, the spare battery will immediately shut down — all to prevent warranty claims, of course.
disadvantages: Damage boost is active only while you have at least 95% of your maximum HP.
Effect is disabled when the tank has the Freezing status effect.
descriptionZh: 当坦克伤害最小时增加炮塔伤害。用于增强型损伤调制器的备用电池，通过人工智能控制的管理系统并联到主电源。该系统可以安全地提高炮塔损坏程度，使其超出调制器的标准能力，但前提是坦克的结构完整性保持完好。如果人工智能检测到船体受到损害，备用电池将立即关闭——当然，所有这些都是为了防止保修索赔。

name: Cryo Shells
description: A replacement of the standard artillery turret's shells with cryopods. On explosion, critically low temperatures not only deal damage but also freeze the target.
advantages: Critical hits and rocket hits in a 5 meter splash radius lower the temperature of damaged enemy tanks, freezing them for 10 seconds.
descriptionZh: 用冷冻舱替换标准炮塔的炮弹。爆炸时，极低的温度不仅会造成伤害，还会冻结目标。

name: Emp Shells
description: The artillery barrel is modernized with an electromagnetic winding. A critical hit from the main turret disables the target's supplies.
advantages: Critical hits and will apply the Electromagnetic Pulse status effect to enemies for 2 seconds.
Rocket hits in a 5 meter splash radius will apply the Electromagnetic Pulse status effect to enemies for 1 second.
descriptionZh: 火炮身管采用电磁绕组进行现代化改造。主炮塔的致命一击会使目标的补给失效。

name: Excelsior
description: Enhances key turret parameters without introducing new functions. This premium augment is the result of a breakthrough research program integrating diamond crystals into the turret’s design. Diamond-coated barrel lining increases operational pressure during fire. Diamond bearings enhance turret’s rotation efficiency. Diamond semiconductors boost the targeting system’s computational performance. The only downside? Its stunning craftsmanship remains hidden from view inside the turret.
descriptionZh: 增强关键炮塔参数而不引入新功能。这种高级增强是一项突破性研究计划的结果，该计划将金刚石晶体融入到炮塔的设计中。金刚石涂层枪管内衬增加了火灾期间的操作压力。金刚石轴承提高了刀塔的旋转效率。金刚石半导体提高了瞄准系统的计算性能。唯一的缺点？其令人惊叹的工艺仍然隐藏在炮塔内。

name: Explosive Shells
description: Splash damage is added. Shell speed is decreased. A replacement of hypervelocity shells with slower high-explosive incendiary. The main turret can now deal damage to multiple targets simultaneously.
advantages: Arcade minimum splash damage radius: 10 m
Arcade average splash damage radius: 2 m
descriptionZh: 增加了溅射伤害。炮弹速度降低。用速度较慢的高爆燃烧弹替代超高速炮弹。主炮塔现在可以同时对多个目标造成伤害。

name: Explosive Warheads
description: Cumulative warheads are replaced with explosive ones. Explosion radius significantly increases, creating risks for groups of enemies.
advantages: Rocket minimum splash damage radius: 10 m
Rocket average splash damage radius: 3 m
descriptionZh: 累积弹头被爆炸弹头取代。爆炸半径显着增加，给敌人群体带来风险。

name: Incendiary Shells
description: Аrtillery turret's shells contain an incendiary mixture and on a critical hit, ignite the target.
advantages: Critical hits and rocket hits in a 5 meter splash radius raise the temperature of damaged enemy tanks; a salvo applies 9 ticks of burn, and an arcade shot or a single rocket apply burn for 5 ticks.
descriptionZh: 炮塔的炮弹含有燃烧混合物，重击后会点燃目标。

name: Jamming Shells
description: Specialised shells are filled with aluminium-coated fibreglass. On successful hits, a small cloud is created that deactivates enemies’ overdrives.
advantages: Normal and critical hits will apply the Jammer status effect to enemies for 5 seconds.
Rocket hits will apply the Jammer status effect to enemies in a 5 meter radius for 1 second.
descriptionZh: 特殊的外壳填充有镀铝玻璃纤维。成功命中后，会产生一小团云，使敌人的超速运转失效。

name: Missile Launcher «spear»
description: Improved fast missiles with faster recharging allow to reach the target instantly. The number of missiles is decreased. A high-speed, high-precision rocket setup. Tremendous speed combined with amazing maneuverability allows rockets to hit even the fastest targets out of the air in a matter of seconds. However, the required improvements to the rocket rudders take up more space, thus fewer rockets are launched per salvo, but salvo reload takes less time.
descriptionZh: 改进的快速导弹具有更快的充电速度，可以立即到达目标。导弹数量减少。高速、高精度的火箭装置。巨大的速度与惊人的机动性相结合，使得火箭能够在几秒钟内击中空中最快的目标。然而，火箭舵所需的改进占用了更多空间，因此每次齐射发射的火箭更少，但齐射重新装弹所需的时间更少。

name: Missile Launcher «swarm»
description: The number of missiles is increased. Aiming time and pause between salvo's rockets are reduced. A special modification created to suppress the enemy with dense missile fire.
descriptionZh: 导弹数量增加。瞄准时间和齐射火箭之间的停顿都减少了。为了用密集的导弹火力压制敌人而创建的特殊改装。

name: Missile Launcher «tornado»
description: A large number of highly maneuverable missiles per salvo with a decreased pause between rockets, but requiring a longer aiming time against enemies. To direct more missiles with an increased blast radius at the enemy, we had to sacrifice lock-on speed. To compensate for this, a specially ordered enhanced targeting drive was installed, which reduces the chance of losing the target during the lock-on process.
advantages: Rocket minimum splash damage radius: 10 m
Rocket average splash damage radius: 5 m
descriptionZh: 每次齐射可发射大量高度机动的导弹，火箭之间的停顿时间减少，但需要更长的瞄准敌人的时间。为了向敌人发射更多具有更大爆炸半径的导弹，我们必须牺牲锁定速度。为了弥补这一点，安装了专门订购的增强型瞄准驱动器，这减少了锁定过程中丢失目标的机会。

name: Missile Launcher «wolfpack»
description: Rocket speed and pause between salvo's rockets are increased. More manoeuvrable and faster rockets for rapid interception capabilities. Almost excludes the possibility of evading rockets and makes it easier to finish enemies off.
descriptionZh: 火箭速度和齐射火箭之间的停顿增加。机动性更强、速度更快的火箭具有快速拦截能力。几乎排除了躲避火箭的可能性，并且更容易消灭敌人。

name: Phoenix
