description: Only tankers who keep rising like a phoenix from the ashes again and again to achieve their goal deserve this weapon. A secret augment. Earn 5 000 000 reputation points using the Scorpion turret to get it.
descriptionZh: 只有那些像凤凰一样浴火重生、一次次实现目标的坦克手才配得上这把武器。秘密增强。使用天蝎炮塔获得 5 000 000 点声誉点数即可获得它。

name: Pulsar
description: An augment made with irreproducible technology. A critical hit generates a quantum vortex that applies several effects at the same time, usually negative ones. Scientists managed to decrease critical damage, but it was not enough to salvage the situation — an enemy will still be sorely defeated once struck. The inventor of the technology is on the international most wanted list.
advantages: Hitting an enemy with a critical shot will apply the following status effects: Jammer : 5 sec Electromagnetic Pulse : 2 sec Stun : 1.5 sec Armor-Piercing : 9 sec
descriptionZh: 用不可复制的技术制成的增强体。致命一击会产生量子漩涡，同时产生多种效果，通常是负面效果。科学家们设法减少了致命伤害，但这还不足以挽救局面——敌人一旦被击中，仍然会被惨败。该技术的发明者名列国际通缉名单上。

name: Stun Shells
description: An additional fuse is added to the barrel of the artillery turret, giving shells a huge impact force. A critical hit from the main turret stuns the target.
advantages: Critical hits will apply the Stun status effect to enemies for 1.5 seconds.
Rocket hits in a 5 meter splash radius will apply the Stun status effect to enemies for 0.4 seconds.
descriptionZh: 火炮炮塔的炮管上额外增加了引信，赋予炮弹巨大的冲击力。主炮塔的致命一击会使目标昏迷。

name: Uranium Shells
description: Incredible density of uranium shells allows them to ricochet effectively. Ammunition is neatly distributed, taking into account the dangerous nature of these shells. Every few hits, you are guaranteed to deal critical damage.
advantages: Radius of mean area damage in normal mode = 2 meters
Minimum area damage radius in normal mode = 12 meters
descriptionZh: 铀弹的难以置信的密度使它们能够有效地弹跳。考虑到这些炮弹的危险性，弹药的分布整齐。每击中几次，你就一定会造成严重伤害。

name: Vacuum Shell
description: Shells deal damage in a large radius. Damage is reduced, but the farther the target is from the shell’s impact point, the more damage it receives. What exactly is inside these shells is unknown. According to one developer, it contains pure liquid vacuum. Be that as it may, the explosion of such a shell deals more damage the farther the target is from the epicenter of the blast.
descriptionZh: 炮弹会在大范围内造成伤害。伤害会减少，但目标距离炮弹弹着点越远，受到的伤害就越大。这些贝壳里面究竟藏着什么尚不清楚。据一位开发人员称，它包含纯液体真空。尽管如此，目标距离爆炸中心越远，这种炮弹的爆炸造成的伤害就越大。

name: Adrenaline
description: Increases turret damage when the tank is severely damaged. Adds a spare battery for the enhanced damage modulator, activated only in extreme circumstances when the tank's hull is critically damaged. Powering the damage modulator from two energy sources is unsafe — it may explode. The requirement to activate it only during severe damage likely exists to avoid warranty claims.
disadvantages: Damage bonus only activates when health is ≤20%
Effect is disabled when the tank has the Freezing status effect.
descriptionZh: 当坦克严重受损时，会增加炮塔伤害。为增强型伤害调制器添加备用电池，仅在坦克车体严重损坏的极端情况下激活。使用两种能源为损伤调制器供电是不安全的——它可能会爆炸。仅在严重损坏时才激活它的要求可能是为了避免保修索赔。

name: Armor-Piercing Sight
description: Special sight which lets you destroy a target's armor with any sniper mode shot and on critical hits. Makes the next shot at the target very sensitive or maybe even fatal.
advantages: Sniping an enemy will apply the Armor-Piercing status effect to them for 9 seconds.
Hitting an enemy with a critical arcade shot will apply the Armor-Piercing status effect to them for 9 seconds.
descriptionZh: 特殊瞄准镜可让您通过任何狙击模式射击和重击来摧毁目标的装甲。使下一次对目标的射击变得非常敏感，甚至可能致命。

name: Camper
description: Increases turret damage when the tank has minimal damage. A spare battery for the enhanced damage modulator, connected in parallel to the primary power source via an AI-controlled management system. This system safely boosts turret damage beyond the modulator’s standard capabilities, but only if the tank’s structural integrity remains intact. If the AI detects that the hull has been compromised, the spare battery will immediately shut down — all to prevent warranty claims, of course.
disadvantages: Damage boost is active only while you have at least 95% of your maximum HP.
Effect is disabled when the tank has the Freezing status effect.
descriptionZh: 当坦克伤害最小时增加炮塔伤害。用于增强型损伤调制器的备用电池，通过人工智能控制的管理系统并联到主电源。该系统可以安全地提高炮塔损坏程度，使其超出调制器的标准能力，但前提是坦克的结构完整性保持完好。如果人工智能检测到船体受到损害，备用电池将立即关闭——当然，所有这些都是为了防止保修索赔。

name: Electrifying Sight
description: Each shot in sniping mode applies the «EMP» status effect to the target. Critical shots in arcade mode also apply the «EMP» status effect. A special sight that lets you cause malfunction of the enemy tank's electronics, deactivating the tank's supplies for some time.
advantages: Sniping an enemy will apply the Electromagnetic Pulse status effect to them for 3 seconds.
Hitting an enemy with a critical arcade shot will apply the Electromagnetic Pulse status effect to them for 2 seconds.
descriptionZh: 狙击模式下的每次射击都会对目标施加“EMP”状态效果。街机模式中的关键镜头也会应用“EMP”状态效果。一种特殊的瞄准镜，可以让敌方坦克的电子设备发生故障，使坦克的补给失效一段时间。

name: Excelsior
description: Enhances key turret or hull parameters without introducing new functions. This premium augment is the result of a breakthrough research program integrating diamond crystals into the turret’s design. Diamond-coated barrel lining increases operational pressure during fire. Diamond bearings enhance turret’s rotation efficiency. Diamond semiconductors boost the targeting system’s computational performance. The only downside? Its stunning craftsmanship remains hidden from view inside the turret.
descriptionZh: 在不引入新功能的情况下增强关键炮塔或车体参数。这种高级增强是一项突破性研究计划的结果，该计划将金刚石晶体融入到炮塔的设计中。金刚石涂层枪管内衬增加了火灾期间的操作压力。金刚石轴承提高了刀塔的旋转效率。金刚石半导体提高了瞄准系统的计算性能。唯一的缺点？其令人惊叹的工艺仍然隐藏在炮塔内。

name: Freezing Sight
description: Each shot in the sniping mode applies the «Freezing» status effect to the target. Critical shots in the arcade mode also apply the «Freezing» status effect. A special sight that lets you slow down the movement of the enemy on the battlefield with critical damage or an arcade shot, and also almost weld his turret to the hull for some time. This makes it possible to prevent the enemy from retreating into cover or turning towards the attacker.
advantages: Sniping an enemy will apply the Freezing status effect to them for 10 seconds.
Hitting an enemy with a critical arcade shot will apply the Freezing status effect to them for 10 seconds.
descriptionZh: 狙击模式下的每次射击都会对目标施加“冻结”状态效果。街机模式中的关键镜头也会应用“冻结”状态效果。一种特殊的瞄准镜，可以让你在战场上以致命伤害或街机射击的方式减慢敌人的移动，并且在一段时间内几乎将他的炮塔焊接到船体上。这可以防止敌人撤退到掩体中或转向攻击者。

name: Healing Emitters
description: Adds healing allied tanks. Regular and sniper damage are decreased. Arcade shot reload takes a bit more time. Critical damage is disabled. Radical enhancement of the Shaft's emitters. Arcade and sniper shots deal less damage, but restore health to allies. This augment opens up unique opportunities for support because you no longer need to expose yourself to enemy fire to heal your teammates.
advantages: Shooting a teammate heals them the same amount it would damage an unarmored enemy
Healing gives 1-10 REPUTATION points, depending on the percentage of health restored
Healing gives 1-20 EXPERIENCE points, depending on the percentage of health restored
disadvantages: Critical damage removed (and no critical healing)
descriptionZh: 添加治疗友军坦克。普通伤害和狙击伤害都会减少。街机射击重新加载需要更多时间。严重伤害被禁用。竖井发射器的彻底增强。街机和狙击射击造成的伤害较少，但可以恢复盟友的生命值。这种增强提供了独特的支持机会，因为你不再需要让自己暴露在敌人的火力下来治疗你的队友。

name: Heavy Capacitors
description: Sniping mode damage is increased. Recharging energy for a next shot takes a bit more time. Replacement for standard capacitors with a heavy type. The shot is charged slower, but the final damage and energy consumption are noticeably increased.
descriptionZh: 狙击模式伤害增加。为下一次射击补充能量需要更多时间。用重型电容器替代标准电容器。射击蓄力变慢，但最终伤害和能量消耗明显增加。

name: Incendiary Sight
description: Each shot in the sniping mode sets the target on fire. Critical shots in the arcade mode also ignite the target. A special sight that lets you engulf your opponent in flames, dealing continuous damage per second for some time. Thus, you can deal damage to an opponent even while reloading.
advantages: Critically hitting or sniping an enemy will raise their temperature by +0.4.
descriptionZh: 狙击模式下的每次射击都会使目标着火。街机模式中的关键射击也会点燃目标。一种特殊的瞄准镜，可以让你将对手吞没在火焰中，在一段时间内每秒造成持续伤害。因此，即使在重新装弹时，您也可以对对手造成伤害。

name: Jamming Sight
description: Each shot in the sniping mode applies the «Jammer» status effect to the target. Critical shots in the arcade mode also apply the «Jammer» status effect. A special sight that lets you stop an opponent from using overdrives, drones, and other boosting effects for a short period of time with critical damage or an arcade shot. The opponent will not be able to turn the tide of the battle and take advantage of their drone.
advantages: Hitting an enemy will apply the Jammer status effect to them for 3 seconds.
Sniping an enemy will apply the Jammer status effect to them for 12 seconds.
Hitting an enemy with a critical arcade shot will apply the Jammer status effect to them for 9 seconds.
descriptionZh: 狙击模式下的每次射击都会对目标施加“干扰器”状态效果。街机模式中的关键镜头也会应用“Jammer”状态效果。一种特殊的瞄准镜，可以让你在短时间内阻止对手使用超速、无人机和其他助推效果，造成严重伤害或街机射击。对手将无法扭转战局并利用他们的无人机。

name: Light Capacitors
description: Sniping mode damage is decreased. Recharging energy for a next shot takes less time. Replacement for standard capacitors with a light type. The shot is charged faster, but the final damage and energy consumption are noticeably reduced.
descriptionZh: 狙击模式伤害降低。为下一次射击充电所需的时间更少。用轻型电容器替代标准电容器。射击蓄力速度更快，但最终伤害和能量消耗明显降低。

name: Phoenix
description: Only tankers who keep rising like a phoenix from the ashes again and again to achieve their goal deserve this weapon. A secret augment. Earn 5 000 000 reputation points using the Shaft turret to get it.
descriptionZh: 只有那些像凤凰一样浴火重生、一次次实现目标的坦克手才配得上这把武器。秘密增强。使用轴炮塔获得 5 000 000 点声望点即可获得它。

name: Pulsar
description: An augment made with irreproducible technology. A critical hit generates a quantum vortex that applies several effects at the same time, usually negative ones. Scientists managed to decrease critical damage, but it was not enough to salvage the situation — an enemy will still be sorely defeated once struck. The inventor of the technology is on the international most wanted list.
advantages: Hitting an enemy with a critical shot will apply the following status effects: Jammer : 9 sec Electromagnetic Pulse : 2 sec Stun : 1 sec Armor-Piercing : 5 sec
descriptionZh: 用不可复制的技术制成的增强体。致命一击会产生量子漩涡，同时产生多种效果，通常是负面效果。科学家们设法减少了致命伤害，但这还不足以挽救局面——敌人一旦被击中，仍然会被惨败。该技术的发明者名列国际通缉名单上。

name: Quasar
description: Standard and Sniper damage are increased, but reload takes more time. Critical damage is increased, turret rotation is slowed down. Inverted heavy capacitors provide enormous damage, but require more time to charge in order to accumulate all their power. Their energy can penetrate even the toughest armor, forcing opponents to reconsider their tactics and stay in cover.
disadvantages: All sniping shots will consume the full energy bar and so require a full reload
descriptionZh: 标准伤害和狙击伤害增加，但装弹需要更多时间。暴击伤害增加，炮塔旋转速度减慢。倒置的重型电容器会造成巨大的损坏，但需要更多的时间来充电才能积聚所有电量。他们的能量甚至可以穿透最坚韧的盔甲，迫使对手重新考虑他们的战术并保持隐蔽。

name: Rapid-Fire Mode
description: Three rapid shots due to decreased arcade shot reload time. Sniping mode damage is decreased. Energy recovery rate is increased. Assault modification that allows you to fire in Arcade mode with quick series of shots, 3 in each. At the same time energy tank capacity is enough for one series of shots. To achieve this rate of fire in the arcade mode, damage in the sniping mode had to be sacrificed. Due to the updated configuration, the sniping mode always consumes the entire energy tank.
descriptionZh: 由于街机射击重新加载时间减少，因此可以进行三次快速射击。狙击模式伤害降低。能量回收率提高。突击修改允许您在街机模式下快速射击，每次射击 3 次。同时能量箱容量足以进行一系列射击。为了在街机模式下达到这样的射速，必须牺牲狙击模式下的伤害。由于配置更新，狙击模式总是会消耗整个能量箱。

name: Short-Band Emitter
description: Modification for tankers that prefer close-range battles and who are used to precise turrets. Increases damage and reloading time in Arcade mode.
descriptionZh: 针对喜欢近距离战斗、习惯精确炮塔的坦克手进行改装。增加街机模式下的伤害和重新加载时间。

name: Stellarator
description: Maximum charge in sniping mode builds up faster. Minimum damage is significantly increased. Maximum damage is decreased, and reload takes a bit more time. Equipped with an experimental high-power reactor, capacitors now reach maximum charge almost instantly. However, rate of fire is limited by capacitor cooldown instead of energy charging time. This flips the optimal turret strategy: fire as fast as possible after entering sniper mode to minimize cooldown delays.
descriptionZh: 狙击模式下的最大电量积累得更快。最小伤害显着增加。最大伤害降低，并且重新加载需要更多时间。配备了实验性高功率反应堆，电容器现在几乎立即达到最大电荷。然而，射速受到电容器冷却时间而不是能量充电时间的限制。这颠覆了最佳炮塔策略：进入狙击模式后尽可能快地开火，以最大限度地减少冷却延迟。

name: Stunning Sight
description: Each shot in the sniping mode applies the Stun status effect to the target. Critical shots in the arcade mode also apply the Stun status effect. A special sight that lets you immobilize an opponent, leaving them unable to shoot, activate overdrives and supplies, or self-destruct for some time. Thus, finishing off such an opponent with arcade shots will become much easier.
advantages: Sniping an enemy will apply the Stun status effect to them for 1.5 seconds.
Hitting an enemy with a critical arcade shot will apply the Stun status effect to them for 1 seconds.
descriptionZh: 狙击模式下的每次射击都会对目标施加眩晕状态效果。街机模式中的关键镜头也会应用眩晕状态效果。一种特殊的瞄准镜，可以让你固定对手，让他们在一段时间内无法射击、激活超速和补给，或者自毁。因此，用街机射击消灭这样的对手将变得容易得多。

name: Adrenaline
description: Increases turret damage when the tank is severely damaged. Adds a spare battery for the enhanced damage modulator, activated only in extreme circumstances when the tank's hull is critically damaged. Powering the damage modulator from two energy sources is unsafe — it may explode. The requirement to activate it only during severe damage likely exists to avoid warranty claims.
disadvantages: Damage bonus only activates when health is ≤25%
Effect is disabled when the tank has the Freezing status effect.
descriptionZh: 当坦克严重受损时，会增加炮塔伤害。为增强型伤害调制器添加备用电池，仅在坦克车体严重损坏的极端情况下激活。使用两种能源为损伤调制器供电是不安全的——它可能会爆炸。仅在严重损坏时才激活它的要求可能是为了避免保修索赔。

name: Armor-Piercing Rounds
description: Replaces common rounds with armor-piercing ones. Critical shots leave an opponent defenseless against the next hits.
advantages: Critically hitting an enemy will apply the Armor-Piercing status effect to them for 2 seconds.
descriptionZh: 用穿甲弹取代普通弹。致命一击会让对手在接下来的攻击中毫无防御能力。

name: Assault Rounds
description: Increased impact force to destabilize the opponent's aim. Critical damage is disabled. With a careful hit to the edge of an enemy's hull, you can knock off their aim. The opponent's projectile will pass by your tank, giving you a decisive advantage in a duel. The important thing is not to miss your own shots.
descriptionZh: 增加冲击力，破坏对手的瞄准。严重伤害被禁用。小心地击中敌人的船体边缘，你就可以击中他们的目标。对手的射弹将掠过你的坦克，让你在决斗中获得决定性的优势。重要的是不要错过自己的镜头。

name: Autocannon
description: Automated charging conveyor belt highly increases the firing rate but also significantly decreases critical hit chance. Regular shots lose most of their effectiveness.
descriptionZh: 自动装弹传送带极大地提高了射击速度，但也显着降低了致命一击的几率。常规射击会失去大部分效果。

name: Camper
description: Increases turret damage when the tank has minimal damage. A spare battery for the enhanced damage modulator, connected in parallel to the primary power source via an AI-controlled management system. This system safely boosts turret damage beyond the modulator’s standard capabilities, but only if the tank’s structural integrity remains intact. If the AI detects that the hull has been compromised, the spare battery will immediately shut down — all to prevent warranty claims, of course.
disadvantages: Damage boost is active only while you have at least 85% of your maximum HP.
Effect is disabled when the tank has the Freezing status effect.
descriptionZh: 当坦克伤害最小时增加炮塔伤害。用于增强型损伤调制器的备用电池，通过人工智能控制的管理系统并联到主电源。该系统可以安全地提高炮塔损坏程度，使其超出调制器的标准能力，但前提是坦克的结构完整性保持完好。如果人工智能检测到船体受到损害，备用电池将立即关闭——当然，所有这些都是为了防止保修索赔。

name: Cryo Rounds
description: Replaces standard shots with rounds filled with freon. On a critical shot, it freezes the target.
advantages: Critical hits lower the target's temperature by -1.00
descriptionZh: 用充满氟利昂的子弹取代标准子弹。在关键一击中，它会冻结目标。

name: Emp Rounds
description: Replaces the standard cumulative shots with EMP rounds. Critical hits disable the target's activated supplies.
advantages: Critically hitting an enemy will apply the Electromagnetic Pulse status effect to them for 1 second.
descriptionZh: 用 EMP 子弹取代标准累积射击。致命一击会使目标的激活补给失效。

name: Excelsior
description: Enhances key turret or hull parameters without introducing new functions. This premium augment is the result of a breakthrough research program integrating diamond crystals into the turret’s design. Diamond-coated barrel lining increases operational pressure during fire. Diamond bearings enhance turret’s rotation efficiency. Diamond semiconductors boost the targeting system’s computational performance. The only downside? Its stunning craftsmanship remains hidden from view inside the turret.
descriptionZh: 在不引入新功能的情况下增强关键炮塔或车体参数。这种高级增强是一项突破性研究计划的结果，该计划将金刚石晶体融入到炮塔的设计中。金刚石涂层枪管内衬增加了火灾期间的操作压力。金刚石轴承提高了刀塔的旋转效率。金刚石半导体提高了瞄准系统的计算性能。唯一的缺点？其令人惊叹的工艺仍然隐藏在炮塔内。

name: Explosive Rounds
description: Replacement for the standard Armor-Piercing shots with explosive rounds. Such rounds can hit multiple targets at once with splash damage, but the damage radius is not that large due to the turret's small caliber. Cumulative shots are not changed and deal critical damage only to one target.
advantages: Splash damage added: Damage at 3m: 100% Damage at 6m: 50% Damage at 9m (outer radius): 50% Critical damage explosion radius: 3 m
descriptionZh: 用爆炸弹替代标准穿甲弹。此类炮弹可以同时击中多个目标并造成溅射伤害，但由于炮塔口径较小，伤害半径并不大。累积射击不会改变，并且仅对一个目标造成致命伤害。

name: High-Precision Aiming System
description: The high-quality barrel and aiming correction mechanism noticeably increase damage. The use of highly accurate components leds to a slight increase in reloading time and a decrease in shell speed.
descriptionZh: 高品质的枪管和瞄准校正机构显着增加了伤害。高精度部件的使用导致装填时间略有增加，炮弹速度降低。

name: Hyperspeed Rounds
description: The damage dealt increases proportionally with the distance from the target, instead of getting decreased. The initial damage is reduced, projectile speed is increased, and critical damage is disabled. Controlled shells have incredible power, the damage of which increases with distance. An explosion of such a shell near one’s own tank can destroy it. To avoid it, the initial speed of shells is significantly increased and the special system limits the number of damage until the shell flies far from the tank.
advantages: Damage percentage at the end of the degression: 300%
descriptionZh: 造成的伤害会随着距目标距离的增加而增加，而不是减少。初始伤害减少，射弹速度增加，并且致命伤害被禁用。受控炮弹具有令人难以置信的威力，其伤害随着距离的增加而增加。这种炮弹在己方坦克附近爆炸可以摧毁它。为了避免这种情况，炮弹的初始速度显着增加，并且特殊的系统限制了伤害的数量，直到炮弹飞离坦克很远。

name: Incendiary Rounds
description: Replaces standard shots with rounds filled with an incendiary compound. On a critical shot, it ignites the target.
advantages: Critical hits raise the target's temperature by +0.40
descriptionZh: 用充满燃烧化合物的子弹取代标准射击。在关键一击中，它会点燃目标。

name: Jamming Rounds
description: Specialized shells are filled with aluminium-coated fiberglass. On successful hits, a small cloud is created that deactivates enemies’ overdrives.
advantages: Hitting an enemy will apply the Jammer status effect to them for 2 seconds.
descriptionZh: 专用外壳填充有镀铝玻璃纤维。成功命中后，会产生一小团云，使敌人的超速运转失效。

name: Paralyzing Rounds
description: Replaces the standard cumulative shots with paralyzing rounds. Critical hits immobilize the target.
advantages: Critical hits Stun the enemy for 1 second
Critical chance step increases even with shots that do not register on the target
descriptionZh: 用瘫痪弹取代标准累积射击。致命一击会使目标无法动弹。

name: Phoenix
description: Only tankers who keep rising like a phoenix from the ashes again and again to achieve their goal deserve this weapon. A secret augment. Earn 5 000 000 reputation points using the Smoky turret to get it.
descriptionZh: 只有那些像凤凰一样浴火重生、一次次实现目标的坦克手才配得上这把武器。秘密增强。使用烟雾炮塔获得 5 000 000 点声望点即可获得它。

name: Pulsar
description: An augment made with irreproducible technology. A critical hit generates a quantum vortex that applies several effects at the same time, usually negative ones. Scientists managed to decrease critical damage, but it was not enough to salvage the situation — an enemy will still be sorely defeated once struck. The inventor of the technology is on the international most wanted list.
advantages: Hitting an enemy with a critical shot will apply the following status effects: Jammer : 2 sec Electromagnetic Pulse : 1 sec Stun : 1 sec Armor-Piercing : 2 sec
descriptionZh: 用不可复制的技术制成的增强体。致命一击会产生量子漩涡，同时产生多种效果，通常是负面效果。科学家们设法减少了致命伤害，但这还不足以挽救局面——敌人一旦被击中，仍然会被惨败。该技术的发明者名列国际通缉名单上。

name: Rubberized Rounds
description: These rubber-encased shells may hit enemies and even deal critical damage after ricocheting. However, the maximum number of ricochets is limited.
descriptionZh: 这些橡胶包裹的炮弹可能会击中敌人，甚至在弹跳后造成严重伤害。然而，最大跳弹次数是有限的。

name: Sorted Ammunition
description: An engineer named Schrödinger succeeded in perfecting a mechanism to load ammunition in a clever way. This augment guarantees that every fourth shot will deal critical damage. How it works and how the engineer envisaged all the misses of the shooter still remains a mystery.
advantages: Every fourth hit is guaranteed to be a critical
The first shot after spawning will be a critical
descriptionZh: 一位名叫薛定谔的工程师成功地以巧妙的方式完善了一种装载弹药的机制。这种增强保证每四次射击都会造成严重伤害。它是如何工作的，以及工程师如何设想射手的所有失误仍然是一个谜。

name: Supercumulative Rounds
description: Supercumulative shots appear in the ammo clip even more rare than the "regular" cumulative rounds, but the damage from such rounds is also much greater. The damage from critical shots is increased because of the reduced critical rate.
descriptionZh: 弹药夹中出现的超级累积射击比“常规”累积子弹更为罕见，但此类子弹造成的伤害也大得多。由于暴击率降低，暴击伤害增加。

name: Adrenaline
description: Increases turret damage when the tank is severely damaged. Adds a spare battery for the enhanced damage modulator, activated only in extreme circumstances when the tank's hull is critically damaged. Powering the damage modulator from two energy sources is unsafe — it may explode. The requirement to activate it only during severe damage likely exists to avoid warranty claims.
disadvantages: Damage bonus only activates when health is ≤25%
Effect is disabled when the tank has the Freezing status effect.
descriptionZh: 当坦克严重受损时，会增加炮塔伤害。为增强型伤害调制器添加备用电池，仅在坦克车体严重损坏的极端情况下激活。使用两种能源为损伤调制器供电是不安全的——它可能会爆炸。仅在严重损坏时才激活它的要求可能是为了避免保修索赔。

name: Armor-Piercing Missiles
description: An augment for bounty hunters who want to destroy powerful targets. Any tank hit by critical damage will not be able to use armor for some time.
advantages: Critically hitting an enemy will apply the Armor-Piercing status effect to them for 9 seconds.
descriptionZh: 对于想要摧毁强大目标的赏金猎人来说是一个增强。任何受到严重伤害的坦克将在一段时间内无法使用装甲。

name: Camper
description: Increases turret damage when the tank has minimal damage. A spare battery for the enhanced damage modulator, connected in parallel to the primary power source via an AI-controlled management system. This system safely boosts turret damage beyond the modulator’s standard capabilities, but only if the tank’s structural integrity remains intact. If the AI detects that the hull has been compromised, the spare battery will immediately shut down — all to prevent warranty claims, of course.
disadvantages: Damage boost is active only while you have at least 85% of your maximum HP.
Effect is disabled when the tank has the Freezing status effect.
descriptionZh: 当坦克伤害最小时增加炮塔伤害。用于增强型损伤调制器的备用电池，通过人工智能控制的管理系统并联到主电源。该系统可以安全地提高炮塔损坏程度，使其超出调制器的标准能力，但前提是坦克的结构完整性保持完好。如果人工智能检测到船体受到损害，备用电池将立即关闭——当然，所有这些都是为了防止保修索赔。

name: Cryo Missiles
description: Critical damage applies the «Freezing» status effect to the enemy tank for a short period of time. A modification with a special rocket converter that enables upon critical hits. Converts standard missiles to freezing ones. Let you slow down the movement of the enemy on the battlefield, and also almost weld their turret to the hull for some time.
advantages: Critical hits lower the temperature of all damaged enemy tanks by 1. Freezing
descriptionZh: 暴击伤害会在短时间内对敌方坦克施加“冰冻”状态效果。使用特殊火箭转换器进行改装，可在重击时启用。将标准导弹转换为冷冻导弹。让你在战场上减慢敌人的移动速度，也让他们的炮塔几乎焊接在车体上一段时间。

name: Excelsior
description: Enhances key turret or hull parameters without introducing new functions. This premium augment is the result of a breakthrough research program integrating diamond crystals into the turret’s design. Diamond-coated barrel lining increases operational pressure during fire. Diamond bearings enhance turret’s rotation efficiency. Diamond semiconductors boost the targeting system’s computational performance. The only downside? Its stunning craftsmanship remains hidden from view inside the turret.
descriptionZh: 在不引入新功能的情况下增强关键炮塔或车体参数。这种高级增强是一项突破性研究计划的结果，该计划将金刚石晶体融入到炮塔的设计中。金刚石涂层枪管内衬增加了火灾期间的操作压力。金刚石轴承提高了刀塔的旋转效率。金刚石半导体提高了瞄准系统的计算性能。唯一的缺点？其令人惊叹的工艺仍然隐藏在炮塔内。

name: Incendiary Missiles
description: Critical damage sets the target on fire for a short period of time. A modification with a special rocket converter that gets enabled on critical hits. Converts standard missiles to incendiary ones that let you engulf your opponent in flames, dealing continuous damage per second for some time.
advantages: Critical hits raise the temperature of all damaged enemy tanks by +0.4 Burning
descriptionZh: 严重伤害会使目标短时间内着火。带有特殊火箭转换器的改装，可在重击时启用。将标准导弹转换为燃烧弹，让你将对手吞没在火焰中，在一段时间内每秒造成持续伤害。

name: Jamming Missiles
description: Damage applies the Jammer status effect to an opponent for a short time. The missiles are equipped with aluminium-coated fibreglass. On successful hits, a small cloud is created that deactivates enemies' overdrives.
advantages: Critically hitting an enemy will apply the Jammer status effect to them for 5 seconds.
descriptionZh: 伤害会在短时间内对对手施加干扰状态效果。这些导弹配备了镀铝玻璃纤维。成功命中后，会产生一小团云，使敌人的超速运转失效。

name: Magnetic Missiles
description: Critical damage applies the «EMP» status effect to the enemy tank for a short period of time. A modification with a special rocket converter that enables upon critical hits. Converts standard missiles to electromagnetic ones. Causes a brief shutdown of the enemy tank's electronics, deactivating the tank's supplies for some time.
advantages: Critically hitting an enemy will apply the Electromagnetic Pulse status effect to them for 3 seconds.
descriptionZh: 暴击伤害会在短时间内对敌方坦克施加“EMP”状态效果。使用特殊火箭转换器进行改装，可在重击时启用。将标准导弹转换为电磁导弹。导致敌方坦克的电子设备短暂关闭，使坦克的补给失效一段时间。

name: Missile Launcher «brass Knuckles»
description: Accelerates rocket salvo targeting but significantly increases reload time after firing. Enables radio-detonation of rockets. This modification was developed after analyzing countless Striker combat scenarios. Enhanced turret armor ensures launchers remain fully loaded with rockets, allowing rapid salvo deployment. However, reloading fresh rockets post-salvo takes much longer. In response to a classified request, the launcher is equipped with a radio-detonation module for mid-flight rocket detonation. Details of this feature remain top-secret.
advantages: Rockets will explode upon double-pressing fire button
descriptionZh: 加速火箭齐射瞄准，但显着增加发射后的重新装填时间。实现火箭的无线电爆炸。这个修改是在分析了无数前锋的战斗场景后开发的。增强型炮塔装甲可确保发射器保持满载火箭，从而实现快速齐射部署。然而，齐射后重新装载新火箭需要更长的时间。为了响应机密请求，发射器配备了无线电引爆模块，用于飞行中火箭引爆。此功能的详细信息仍然是绝密的。

name: Missile Launcher «cyclone»
description: Modification for those who hunt heavy tanks. Doubles the number of rockets per launch, but while aiming target aquisition time is also increased.
descriptionZh: 适合狩猎重型坦克的人的改装。每次发射的火箭数量加倍，但瞄准目标的捕获时间也增加了。

name: Missile Launcher «faust»
description: Range of missiles has been decreased, but it takes less time to aim on a target and reload. Like an artist on a theater stage, a player with this augment acts for an audience. No intermissions, only lightning-quick course of events on the battlefield. However, the artist is a beginner, sometimes they fail to convey their idea to the viewer on a theater balcony.
descriptionZh: 导弹的射程已减小，但瞄准目标和重新装弹所需的时间更少。就像剧院舞台上的艺术家一样，具有此增强功能的玩家为观众表演。没有中场休息，战场上的事态发展如闪电般迅速。然而，艺术家是一个初学者，有时他们无法将自己的想法传达给剧院阳台上的观众。

name: Missile Launcher «hunter»
description: Modification for the fans of a high accuracy shooting. Provides an almost instant target aquisition while aiming, but has only one rocket per launch.
descriptionZh: 为高精度射击爱好者进行修改。在瞄准时提供几乎即时的目标捕获，但每次发射只有一枚火箭。

name: Missile Launcher «hydra»
description: A rapid-fire rocket launcher. The salvo launches an enormous amount of uncontrollable rockets with decreased damage. These rockets used to be mounted on attack helicopters. Due to the lack of aiming system and the smaller size, it is possible to cram multiple rockets into the launcher. The long duration of salvo attack allows switching between enemies while shooting without interrupting the flow of salvo rockets. Not that the tanker had a choice to interrupt the rocket flow anyway.
descriptionZh: 速射火箭发射器。齐射会发射大量无法控制的火箭，但伤害却会降低。这些火箭曾经安装在攻击直升机上。由于缺乏瞄准系统且尺寸较小，发射器内可以塞入多枚火箭弹。齐射攻击持续时间长，可以在射击时在敌人之间切换，而不会中断齐射火箭的流动。无论如何，加油机都没有选择中断火箭的流动。

name: Missile Launcher «meteor»
description: Increased damage when you hit a target. Splash damage is greatly reduced, but impact force is increased. Feel the force of a meteor! Your enemy has little chance to survive this meteor strike. However, to take advantage of such crushing power, you must aim carefully. An augment for real missile professionals!
advantages: Pause between rockets in salvo = 50 ms
descriptionZh: 击中目标时伤害增加。飞溅伤害大大减少，但冲击力增加。感受流星的力量！你的敌人几乎没有机会在这次流星袭击中幸存。然而，要利用这种毁灭性的力量，你必须仔细瞄准。对真正的导弹专业人员的增强！

name: Missile Launcher «tandem»
description: Fires two quick-aiming rockets in a salvo. Rocket angular velocity, critical damage chance, and reload time after salvo are increased. Got an opponent who predicts every move and dodges all your rockets? Fire a fast-homing rocket at them! Is the opponent so cool that they dodged that too? Fire two fast-homing rockets simultaneously! See them try to dodge that.
descriptionZh: 齐射两枚快速瞄准火箭。火箭角速度、致命伤害几率和齐射后的装弹时间均增加。有一个对手可以预测你的一举一动并躲避你所有的火箭吗？向他们发射快速寻的火箭！对手这么厉害，竟然也躲开了？同时发射两枚快速寻的火箭！看到他们试图躲避这一点。

name: Missile Launcher «uranium»
description: Damage is increased, but missiles accelerate slowly. A Striker modification with weighted missiles. To ensure launcher safety, these missiles reload and accelerate slowly, and exit the barrel at minimal speed even during salvos. Landing a hit feels like a celebration, not just because it’s incredibly difficult, but because enemy tanks explode into fireworks from the sheer weight of the rocket payload.
descriptionZh: 伤害增加，但导弹加速缓慢。带加重导弹的前锋改装版。为了确保发射器的安全，这些导弹会缓慢地重新装弹和加速，即使在齐射期间也以最小的速度离开炮管。命中目标感觉像是一场庆祝，不仅因为这非常困难，还因为火箭有效载荷的绝对重量会导致敌方坦克爆炸成烟花。

name: Phoenix
description: Only tankers who keep rising like a phoenix from the ashes again and again to achieve their goal deserve this weapon. A secret augment. Earn 5 000 000 reputation points using the Striker turret to get it.
descriptionZh: 只有那些像凤凰一样浴火重生、一次次实现目标的坦克手才配得上这把武器。秘密增强。使用前锋炮塔获得 5 000 000 声望点即可获得它。

name: Pulsar
description: An augment made with irreproducible technology. A critical hit generates a quantum vortex that applies several effects at the same time, usually negative ones. Scientists managed to decrease critical damage, but it was not enough to salvage the situation — an enemy will still be sorely defeated once struck. The inventor of the technology is on the international most wanted list.
advantages: Hitting an enemy with a critical shot will apply the following status effects: Jammer : 5 sec Electromagnetic Pulse : 3 sec Stun : 1.5 sec Armor-Piercing : 9 sec
descriptionZh: 用不可复制的技术制成的增强体。致命一击会产生量子漩涡，同时产生多种效果，通常是负面效果。科学家们设法减少了致命伤害，但这还不足以挽救局面——敌人一旦被击中，仍然会被惨败。该技术的发明者名列国际通缉名单上。

name: Remote Rocket Explosives
description: Rockets are provided with a contactless trigger and radio emitter. Double-press on the fire button, while the rocket is still in the air, will immediately explode it. Be cautious while firing single shots!
advantages: Rockets will explode upon double-pressing fire button
disadvantages: Possibility of self-damage if not careful
descriptionZh: 火箭配备有非接触式触发器和无线电发射器。当火箭仍在空中时，双击发射按钮，会立即爆炸。单发射击时要小心！

name: Stunning Missiles
description: A modification to immobilize dangerous targets. Any tank hit by critical damage will not be able to move for a period of time.
advantages: Critically hitting an enemy will apply the Stun status effect to them for 1.5 seconds.
descriptionZh: 用于固定危险目标的修改。任何受到严重伤害的坦克都会在一段时间内无法移动。

name: Vacuum Missiles
description: The further a target is from the epicenter of the explosion, the more damage it receives. Pressing the fire button again immediately detonates the missile while it is still in the air. A unique combination of remote and vacuum explosion technologies, fast-flying missiles would be more effective if aimed close to the target, but not directly at it. The blast from an exploding missile deals greater damage than a direct hit.
advantages: Rockets will explode upon double-pressing fire button
disadvantages: Possibility of self-damage if not careful
descriptionZh: 目标距离爆炸中心越远，受到的伤害就越大。再次按下发射按钮会立即引爆仍在空中的导弹。远程和真空爆炸技术的独特结合，快速飞行的导弹如果瞄准目标附近而不是直接瞄准目标，将会更加有效。爆炸导弹造成的爆炸比直接命中造成的伤害更大。

name: Acceleration Protocol
description: A modification for those who enjoy fast attacks. It turns Tesla's ball lightning into an overwhelming force of nature that lets you drive fast following your ball lightning. This augment increases the ball lightning's speed and its maximum distance making it possible to break into the opponent's base and cause chaos.
descriptionZh: 针对那些喜欢快速攻击的人的修改。它将特斯拉的球状闪电变成了压倒性的自然力量，让您可以跟随球状闪电快速行驶。这种增强增加了球状闪电的速度和最大距离，使其有可能闯入对手的基地并造成混乱。

name: Adrenaline
description: Increases turret damage when the tank is severely damaged. Adds a spare battery for the enhanced damage modulator, activated only in extreme circumstances when the tank's hull is critically damaged. Powering the damage modulator from two energy sources is unsafe — it may explode. The requirement to activate it only during severe damage likely exists to avoid warranty claims.
disadvantages: Damage bonus only activates when health is ≤35%
Effect is disabled when the tank has the Freezing status effect.
descriptionZh: 当坦克严重受损时，会增加炮塔伤害。为增强型伤害调制器添加备用电池，仅在坦克车体严重损坏的极端情况下激活。使用两种能源为损伤调制器供电是不安全的——它可能会爆炸。仅在严重损坏时才激活它的要求可能是为了避免保修索赔。

name: Armor-Piercing Discharge
description: A modification that makes opponents extra vulnerable to oncoming shots. Ball lightning and critical hits apply the «Armor-piercing» status effect.
advantages: Critical hits activate the Armor-Piercing status effect for 5 seconds on enemies hit
Ball lightning activates the Armor-Piercing status effect for 9 seconds on enemies hit
Permits ball lightning to bounce off props, similar to Ricochet: Maximum number of ricochets: 10
disadvantages: Ball lightning does not burst until the 11th impact and so is less likely to cause splash damage
Range from one chain lightning to the next ball lightning: 1 m
descriptionZh: 这一修改使对手更容易受到迎面而来的射击的攻击。球状闪电和暴击会施加“穿甲”状态效果。

name: Camper
description: Increases turret damage when the tank has minimal damage. A spare battery for the enhanced damage modulator, connected in parallel to the primary power source via an AI-controlled management system. This system safely boosts turret damage beyond the modulator’s standard capabilities, but only if the tank’s structural integrity remains intact. If the AI detects that the hull has been compromised, the spare battery will immediately shut down — all to prevent warranty claims, of course.
disadvantages: Damage boost is active only while you have at least 50% of your maximum HP.
Effect is disabled when the tank has the Freezing status effect.
descriptionZh: 当坦克伤害最小时增加炮塔伤害。用于增强型损伤调制器的备用电池，通过人工智能控制的管理系统并联到主电源。该系统可以安全地提高炮塔损坏程度，使其超出调制器的标准能力，但前提是坦克的结构完整性保持完好。如果人工智能检测到船体受到损害，备用电池将立即关闭——当然，所有这些都是为了防止保修索赔。

name: Dilatory Protocol
description: Ball lightning speed and range of fire are decreased. Ball lightning reload time is increased. This modification is crucial for a strong defense. It stabilises the ball lightning's voltage and significantly slows it down, making it much easier to make lightning chains and incapacitate more opponents. However, it is important to note that ball lightning reload will take longer.
descriptionZh: 球状闪电的速度和射程降低。球状闪电装弹时间增加。这一修改对于强大的防御至关重要。它可以稳定球状闪电的电压并显着减慢速度，从而更容易形成闪电链并使更多对手丧失能力。然而，需要注意的是，球状闪电的重新加载将需要更长的时间。

name: Electroturret
description: This augment gives Tesla a level of versatility that is not available to other turrets. Ball lightning leaves your barrel as fast as a shot and will travel large distances and cause your opponents a lot of trouble. However, the ball flies so fast that it's almost impossible to use it for chain lightning.
descriptionZh: 这种增强为特斯拉提供了其他炮塔所不具备的多功能性。球状闪电像射击一样快地离开你的枪管，并且会传播很远的距离，给你的对手带来很多麻烦。然而，球飞得如此之快，几乎不可能用它来产生连锁闪电。

name: Endothermic Lightning
description: What happens when a bolt of lightning meets a tank full of Freon? You get a ball of icy electricity flying towards opponents, freezing them on contact. Moreover, critical hits apply the «Freezing» status effect too. Such versatility for Tesla will cause opponents to break into a cold sweat, and they won't even be able to run away.
advantages: Critical hits and ball lightning lower the temperature of enemies hit by -1.00
Permits ball lightning to bounce off props, similar to Ricochet: Maximum number of ricochets: 10
disadvantages: Ball lightning does not burst until the 11th impact and so is less likely to cause splash damage
Range from one chain lightning to the next ball lightning: 1 m
descriptionZh: 当闪电遇到装满氟利昂的水箱时会发生什么？你会得到一团冰冷的电球飞向对手，在接触时冻结他们。此外，暴击也会施加“冻结”状态效果。特斯拉的这种全能性会让对手惊出一身冷汗，甚至根本跑不掉。

name: Excelsior
description: Enhances key turret or hull parameters without introducing new functions. This premium augment is the result of a breakthrough research program integrating diamond crystals into the turret’s design. Diamond-coated barrel lining increases operational pressure during fire. Diamond bearings enhance turret’s rotation efficiency. Diamond semiconductors boost the targeting system’s computational performance. The only downside? Its stunning craftsmanship remains hidden from view inside the turret.
descriptionZh: 在不引入新功能的情况下增强关键炮塔或车体参数。这种高级增强是一项突破性研究计划的结果，该计划将金刚石晶体融入到炮塔的设计中。金刚石涂层枪管内衬增加了火灾期间的操作压力。金刚石轴承提高了刀塔的旋转效率。金刚石半导体提高了瞄准系统的计算性能。唯一的缺点？其令人惊叹的工艺仍然隐藏在炮塔内。

name: Exothermic Lightning
description: With this augment equipped, ball lightning will deflect off surfaces and ignite opponents on contact. Critical hits will also apply the «Burning» status effect. Make good use of it to deal more damage to opponents.
advantages: Critical hits raise the temperature of enemies hit by +0.40
Ball lightning raises the temperature of enemies hit by +1.00
Permits ball lightning to bounce off props, similar to Ricochet: Maximum number of ricochets: 10
disadvantages: Ball lightning does not burst until the 11th impact and so is less likely to cause splash damage
Range from one chain lightning to the next ball lightning: 1 m
descriptionZh: 配备此增强功能后，球状闪电将偏离表面并点燃接触的对手。暴击也会施加“燃烧”状态效果。充分利用它对对手造成更多伤害。

name: Increased Voltage
description: Regular damage to targets in the chain is not reduced. Increasing the output voltage on the Tesla coils, far beyond safe limits fundamentally, changes the efficiency level of the chain lightning. Under standard conditions, only rare critical damage shots ensure a consistent chain lightning breakthrough. With the new increased voltage coils, the effect of damage reduction when the number of targets in the chain increases becomes almost negligible with each chain lightning strike. The second most effective way, after the N2 bomb, to make enemy tanks avoid clustering.
descriptionZh: 对链中目标的常规伤害不会减少。增加特斯拉线圈的输出电压，从根本上远远超出安全极限，会改变连锁闪电的效率水平。在标准条件下，只有罕见的致命伤害射击才能确保持续的连锁闪电突破。使用新的增强电压线圈，当链中目标数量增加时，每次链雷击的伤害减少效果几乎可以忽略不计。继N2炸弹之后第二个最有效的方法，可以使敌方坦克避免集群。

name: Jamming Discharge
description: A modification that lets you apply the «Jammer» status effect with every hit you land. This instantly destroys enemies' plans to use their superpowers and drones.
advantages: Hitting an enemy with either chain or ball lightning applies the Jammer status effect to them for 3 seconds
Permits ball lightning to bounce off props, similar to Ricochet: Maximum number of ricochets: 10
disadvantages: Ball lightning does not burst until the 11th impact and so is less likely to cause splash damage
descriptionZh: 一项修改可以让你在每次击中时应用“Jammer”状态效果。这会立即摧毁敌人使用超能力和无人机的计划。

name: Minus-Field
description: This augment adds the Ricochet's minus-field to Tesla's ball lightning. This makes the turret not only be universal on the battlefield but also be safe to use. An accidental shot towards a wall will no longer deal damage to your tank as the ball will ricochet off the wall.
advantages: Permits ball lightning to bounce off props, similar to Ricochet: Maximum number of ricochets: 10
descriptionZh: 这种增强将跳弹的负场添加到特斯拉的球状闪电中。这使得炮塔不仅在战场上通用，而且使用安全。意外射向墙壁将不再对你的坦克造成伤害，因为球会从墙上弹开。

name: Phoenix
description: Only tankers who keep rising like a phoenix from the ashes again and again to achieve their goal deserve this weapon. A secret augment. Earn 5 000 000 reputation points using the Tesla turret to get it.
descriptionZh: 只有那些像凤凰一样浴火重生、一次次实现目标的坦克手才配得上这把武器。秘密增强。使用 Tesla 炮塔获得 5,000,000 点声望点即可获得它。

name: Pulsar
description: An augment made with irreproducible technology. A critical hit generates a quantum vortex that applies several effects at the same time, usually negative ones. Scientists managed to decrease critical damage and critical chance, but it was not enough to salvage the situation — an enemy will still be sorely defeated once struck. The inventor of the technology is on the international most wanted list.
advantages: Hitting an enemy with a critical shot will apply the following status effects: Jammer : 3 sec Electromagnetic Pulse : 1 sec Stun : 1 sec Armor-Piercing : 5 sec
disadvantages: Range from one chain lightning to the next ball lightning: 1 m
descriptionZh: 用不可复制的技术制成的增强体。致命一击会产生量子漩涡，同时产生多种效果，通常是负面效果。科学家们设法降低了暴击伤害和暴击几率，但这还不足以挽救局面——敌人一旦被击中，仍然会被惨败。该技术的发明者名列国际通缉名单上。

name: Shock Therapy
description: The lightning strikes much more frequently, but the striking distance are decreased, and it cannot generate chain lightning. This Tesla variant is designed for single-target elimination. Enemies caught in its strike zone have virtually no chance of survival. To ensure success, you must get dangerously close to your target, practically hugging the enemy tank, to deliver a devastating "shock therapy" strike.
disadvantages: Radius of adding a tank to the chain (m) : 1 m
Radius of adding ball lightning to the chain (m) : 1 m
descriptionZh: 雷击次数增多，但雷击距离缩短，无法产生连锁闪电。这个 Tesla 变体是为单一目标消除而设计的。陷入其攻击区域的敌人几乎没有生存的机会。为了确保成功，你必须危险地接近目标，几乎拥抱敌人的坦克，以发动毁灭性的“休克疗法”打击。

name: Shocking Lightning
description: Tired of opponents destroying you? Need to freeze an enemy on the spot quickly? This augment will help you. Ball lightning and critical hits apply the «Stun» status effect on the target. The enemy will be dazed and confused, leaving you to seize the opportunity to gain the upper hand.
advantages: Critical hits activate the Stun status effect for 1 second
Ball lightning activates the Stun status effect for 1.5 seconds on enemies hit
Permits ball lightning to bounce off props, similar to Ricochet: Maximum number of ricochets: 10
disadvantages: Ball lightning does not burst until the 11th impact and is less likely to cause splash damage
Range from one chain lightning to the next ball lightning: 1 m
descriptionZh: 厌倦了对手摧毁你吗？需要快速将敌人冻结在原地吗？这个增强将会帮助你。球状闪电和致命一击会对目标施加“眩晕”状态效果。敌人会茫然不知所措，让你抓住机会占据上风。

name: Superconducting Discharge
description: With this augment equipped, electric discharges become so powerful that tank electronics fail and activated supplies are disabled. It's absolutely safe for its owner and teammates, for the innovative aiming system blocks the effect of ball lightning towards friendlies. Both ball lightning and critical hits apply the «Electromagnetic pulse» status effect on the target.
advantages: Critical hits apply the Electromagnetic Pulse status effect on the enemy for 2 seconds.
Ball lightning applies the Electromagnetic Pulse status effect for 3 seconds on the enemies hit
Permits ball lightning to bounce off props, similar to Ricochet: Maximum number of ricochets: 10
disadvantages: Ball lightning does not burst until the 11th impact and is less likely to cause splash damage
Range from one chain lightning to the next ball lightning: 1 m
descriptionZh: 配备这种增强装置后，放电变得如此强大，以至于坦克电子设备失效，激活的电源被禁用。它对于它的主人和队友来说是绝对安全的，因为创新的瞄准系统可以阻挡球状闪电对友军的影响。球状闪电和暴击都会对目标施加“电磁脉冲”状态效果。

name: Adaptive Reload
description: Passes control over the turret’s reloading system to an Artificial Intelligence (AI). Hits motivate AI to significantly decrease reload duration for the next shot. Unfortunately, so far no one has succeeded to teach the AI how to reload each shot faster, regardless of hit or miss.
descriptionZh: 将炮塔装弹系统的控制权交给人工智能 (AI)。命中会促使人工智能显着缩短下一次射击的装弹时间。不幸的是，到目前为止，还没有人成功地教会人工智能如何更快地重新装弹，无论击中还是未击中。

name: Adrenaline
description: Increases turret damage when the tank is severely damaged. Adds a spare battery for the enhanced damage modulator, activated only in extreme circumstances when the tank's hull is critically damaged. Powering the damage modulator from two energy sources is unsafe — it may explode. The requirement to activate it only during severe damage likely exists to avoid warranty claims.
disadvantages: Damage bonus only activates when health is ≤25%
Effect is disabled when the tank has the Freezing status effect.
descriptionZh: 当坦克严重受损时，会增加炮塔伤害。为增强型伤害调制器添加备用电池，仅在坦克车体严重损坏的极端情况下激活。使用两种能源为损伤调制器供电是不安全的——它可能会爆炸。仅在严重损坏时才激活它的要求可能是为了避免保修索赔。

name: Bolter
description: Slow projectiles that accelerate over time. Reload takes much less time. Impact force and Recoil are increased. Replacing standard shells with self-accelerating «bolts» — active-reactive projectiles that explode with great force when they hit the target. The reduced size of casing of such projectiles significantly speeds up reloading.
descriptionZh: 缓慢的射弹随着时间的推移而加速。重新加载所需的时间要少得多。冲击力和后坐力增加。用自加速“螺栓”取代标准炮弹——主动反应射弹，在击中目标时会产生巨大的爆炸力。此类射弹外壳尺寸的减小显着加快了装填速度。

name: Camper
description: Increases turret damage when the tank has minimal damage. A spare battery for the enhanced damage modulator, connected in parallel to the primary power source via an AI-controlled management system. This system safely boosts turret damage beyond the modulator’s standard capabilities, but only if the tank’s structural integrity remains intact. If the AI detects that the hull has been compromised, the spare battery will immediately shut down — all to prevent warranty claims, of course.
disadvantages: Damage boost is active only while you have at least 85% of your maximum HP.
Effect is disabled when the tank has the Freezing status effect.
descriptionZh: 当坦克伤害最小时增加炮塔伤害。用于增强型损伤调制器的备用电池，通过人工智能控制的管理系统并联到主电源。该系统可以安全地提高炮塔损坏程度，使其超出调制器的标准能力，但前提是坦克的结构完整性保持完好。如果人工智能检测到船体受到损害，备用电池将立即关闭——当然，所有这些都是为了防止保修索赔。

name: Excelsior
description: Enhances key turret or hull parameters without introducing new functions. This premium augment is the result of a breakthrough research program integrating diamond crystals into the turret’s design. Diamond-coated barrel lining increases operational pressure during fire. Diamond bearings enhance turret’s rotation efficiency. Diamond semiconductors boost the targeting system’s computational performance. The only downside? Its stunning craftsmanship remains hidden from view inside the turret.
descriptionZh: 在不引入新功能的情况下增强关键炮塔或车体参数。这种高级增强是一项突破性研究计划的结果，该计划将金刚石晶体融入到炮塔的设计中。金刚石涂层枪管内衬增加了火灾期间的操作压力。金刚石轴承提高了刀塔的旋转效率。金刚石半导体提高了瞄准系统的计算性能。唯一的缺点？其令人惊叹的工艺仍然隐藏在炮塔内。

name: Hyperspeed Shells
description: Controlled shells with incredible power the damage of which increases with distance. An explosion of such a shell near one’s own tank can destroy it. To avoid it, the initial speed of shells is significantly increased and the special system limits the number of damage until the shell flies far from the tank.
advantages: Damage percentage at the end of the degression = 300%
descriptionZh: 具有令人难以置信的威力的受控炮弹，其伤害随着距离的增加而增加。这种炮弹在己方坦克附近爆炸可以摧毁它。为了避免这种情况，炮弹的初始速度显着增加，并且特殊的系统限制了伤害的数量，直到炮弹飞离坦克很远。

name: Phoenix
description: Only tankers who keep rising like a phoenix from the ashes again and again to achieve their goal deserve this weapon. A secret augment. Earn 5 000 000 reputation points using the Thunder turret to get it.
descriptionZh: 只有那些像凤凰一样浴火重生、一次次实现目标的坦克手才配得上这把武器。秘密增强。使用雷霆炮塔获得 5 000 000 声望点即可获得它。

name: Pulsar
description: An augment made with irreproducible technology. A critical hit generates a quantum vortex that applies several effects at the same time, usually negative ones. Scientists managed to decrease critical damage, but it was not enough to salvage the situation — an enemy will still be sorely defeated once struck. The inventor of the technology is on the international most wanted list.
advantages: Hitting an enemy with a critical shot will apply the following status effects: Jammer : 5 sec Electromagnetic Pulse : 2 sec Stun : 1 sec Armor-Piercing : 5 sec
descriptionZh: 用不可复制的技术制成的增强体。致命一击会产生量子漩涡，同时产生多种效果，通常是负面效果。科学家们设法减少了致命伤害，但这还不足以挽救局面——敌人一旦被击中，仍然会被惨败。该技术的发明者名列国际通缉名单上。

name: Small Caliber Charging Machine
description: Using small caliber rounds in combination with the charging machine allows to reduce the reload time. Small caliber rounds deal less damage.
descriptionZh: 将小口径弹药与装弹机结合使用可以减少装填时间。小口径子弹造成的伤害较小。

name: Strict Ammunition Load
description: An autoloader with sorted ammunition allows you to reach a greater rate of fire, and guarantees that every third shell deals critical damage.
advantages: Every third hit is guaranteed to be a critical
The first shot after spawning will be a critical
descriptionZh: 装有分类弹药的自动装弹机可以让您达到更高的射速，并保证每三发炮弹就会造成严重伤害。

name: Subcaliber Rounds
description: Replacement for the frag round with a penetrating ammo type and huge kinetic energy. Such rounds don't explode upon hitting a tank or an obstacle and cannot damage the shooter themselves.
descriptionZh: 破片弹的替代品，具有穿透性弹药类型和巨大的动能。这种子弹在击中坦克或障碍物时不会爆炸，也不会损坏射手本身。

name: Vacuum Shells
description: Nobody quite knows what’s inside these shells. The inventor says it is the purest liquid vacuum. Whatever it is, an explosion of such a shell deals more damage the further a target is from the epicenter of the explosion, but direct hit damage is decreased.
advantages: Radius of average splash damage: 9 m
descriptionZh: 没有人完全知道这些贝壳里面有什么。发明者说这是最纯净的液体真空。不管是什么，目标距离爆炸中心越远，这种炮弹的爆炸造成的伤害就越大，但直接命中伤害会降低。

name: «anvil» Shells
description: Enhanced shells with additional charges of gunpowder. They can deal critical damage to all targets in a range of explosion, not just by direct hits.
descriptionZh: 带有额外火药的增强型炮弹。它们可以对爆炸范围内的所有目标造成严重伤害，而不仅仅是直接命中。

name: «corrosion» Shells
description: Adds a few shells with a unique chemical composition that enables them to instantly destroy even the strongest armor plating. On a critical hit, such shells can destroy armor of multiple tanks at once.
advantages: Critical hits apply the Armor-Piercing status effect to all enemies in a 12 meter radius for 5 seconds.
descriptionZh: 添加一些具有独特化学成分的炮弹，使它们能够立即摧毁最坚固的装甲板。一旦受到重击，这种炮弹可以同时摧毁多辆坦克的装甲。

name: «magneto» Shells
description: Adds a few shells with an EMP core to the ammunition. On a critical hit, such shells can disable supplies of multiple tanks at once.
advantages: Critical hits apply the Electromagnetic Pulse status effect to all enemies in a 12 meter radius for 2 seconds.
descriptionZh: 在弹药中添加一些带有电磁脉冲核心的炮弹。一旦受到严重打击，这种炮弹可以同时使多辆坦克的补给失效。

name: «nanotech» Shells
description: Shells with a high-technology core packed with nanobots. On hit, it heals a teammate. But when you hit an enemy, nanobots play the role of armor-piercing core, albeit a very expensive one.
advantages: Shooting a teammate heals them the same amount it would damage an unarmored enemy. Healing gives from 1 to 10 reputation points, depending on the amount of health restored. Healing gives from 1 to 20 experience points, depending on the amount of health restored.
Healing gives from 1 to 10 reputation points, depending on the amount of health restored.
Healing gives from 1 to 20 experience points, depending on the amount of health restored.
Healing is not affected by range
disadvantages: Splash damage does not heal allied tanks
descriptionZh: 具有高科技核心的外壳，里面装有纳米机器人。击中时，它会治愈一名队友。但当你击中敌人时，纳米机器人会扮演穿甲核心的角色，尽管它非常昂贵。

name: «noise» Shells
description: Adds a few shells crafted out of aluminum chips to the ammunition. On critical hits, such shells can disable overdrive activation and drones for multiple tanks at once.
advantages: Hitting an enemy tank applies the Jammer status effect to them and all enemies in a 12 meter radius for 3 seconds.
descriptionZh: 在弹药中添加一些用铝片制成的炮弹。在受到严重打击时，此类炮弹可以同时禁用多个坦克的超速激活和无人机。

name: «peacekeeper» Shells
description: Adds a few stunning shells with a huge impact force to the ammunition. On a critical hit, such shells can immobilise multiple tanks at once.
advantages: Critical hits apply the Stun status effect to all enemies in a 12 meter radius for 1 second.
descriptionZh: 为弹药添加一些具有巨大冲击力的令人惊叹的炮弹。一旦受到重击，这种炮弹可以同时使多辆坦克瘫痪。

name: «salamander» Shells
description: Adds a few incendiary shells to the ammunition. On a critical hit, such shells can burn multiple tanks at once.
advantages: Critical hits raise the temperature of all enemy tanks in a 12 meter radius by +0.40.
descriptionZh: 在弹药中添加一些燃烧弹。一旦受到重击，这种炮弹可以同时烧毁多辆坦克。

name: «sledgehammer» Rounds
description: Rounds with thick lead casting slow down the projectile speed and reduce firing range, but the massive projectile size allows for a noticeable increase in damage.
descriptionZh: 厚铅铸件的子弹会降低射弹速度并减少射程，但巨大的射弹尺寸会显着增加伤害。

name: «wyvern» Shells
description: Adds a few shells with a cryo core to the ammunition. On a critical hit, such shells can freeze multiple tanks at once.
advantages: Critical hits lower the temperature of all enemy tanks in a 12 meter radius by -1.00.
descriptionZh: 在弹药中添加一些带有低温核心的炮弹。一旦受到重击，这种炮弹可以同时冻结多辆坦克。

name: Adrenaline
description: Increases turret damage when the tank is severely damaged. Adds a spare battery for the enhanced damage modulator, activated only in extreme circumstances when the tank's hull is critically damaged. Powering the damage modulator from two energy sources is unsafe — it may explode. The requirement to activate it only during severe damage likely exists to avoid warranty claims.
disadvantages: Damage bonus only activates when health is ≤35%
Effect is disabled when the tank has the Freezing status effect.
descriptionZh: 当坦克严重受损时，会增加炮塔伤害。为增强型伤害调制器添加备用电池，仅在坦克车体严重损坏的极端情况下激活。使用两种能源为损伤调制器供电是不安全的——它可能会爆炸。仅在严重损坏时才激活它的要求可能是为了避免保修索赔。

name: Camper
description: Increases turret damage when the tank has minimal damage. A spare battery for the enhanced damage modulator, connected in parallel to the primary power source via an AI-controlled management system. This system safely boosts turret damage beyond the modulator’s standard capabilities, but only if the tank’s structural integrity remains intact. If the AI detects that the hull has been compromised, the spare battery will immediately shut down — all to prevent warranty claims, of course.
disadvantages: Damage boost is active only while you have at least 95% of your maximum HP.
Effect is disabled when the tank has the Freezing status effect.
descriptionZh: 当坦克伤害最小时增加炮塔伤害。用于增强型损伤调制器的备用电池，通过人工智能控制的管理系统并联到主电源。该系统可以安全地提高炮塔损坏程度，使其超出调制器的标准能力，但前提是坦克的结构完整性保持完好。如果人工智能检测到船体受到损害，备用电池将立即关闭——当然，所有这些都是为了防止保修索赔。

name: Cryo Shells
description: Critical hits freeze the target.
advantages: Critically hit enemies are frozen by -1.0
descriptionZh: 致命一击会冻结目标。

name: Duplet
description: Both barrels fire at the same time. Removes the restriction of the simultaneous work of loading mechanisms of both cannons. Works with no problems in 98.46% of the cases before the average expected time of an enemy tank’s death.
descriptionZh: 两个枪管同时开火。消除了两门火炮装弹机构同时工作的限制。在敌方坦克平均预期死亡时间之前，98.46% 的情况下都可以正常工作。

name: Excelsior
description: Enhances key turret or hull parameters without introducing new functions. This premium augment is the result of a breakthrough research program integrating diamond crystals into the turret’s design. Diamond-coated barrel lining increases operational pressure during fire. Diamond bearings enhance turret’s rotation efficiency. Diamond semiconductors boost the targeting system’s computational performance. The only downside? Its stunning craftsmanship remains hidden from view inside the turret.
descriptionZh: 在不引入新功能的情况下增强关键炮塔或车体参数。这种高级增强是一项突破性研究计划的结果，该计划将金刚石晶体融入到炮塔的设计中。金刚石涂层枪管内衬增加了火灾期间的操作压力。金刚石轴承提高了刀塔的旋转效率。金刚石半导体提高了瞄准系统的计算性能。唯一的缺点？其令人惊叹的工艺仍然隐藏在炮塔内。

name: Explosive Charge
description: Normal shots can deal damage to multiple targets simultaneously. Due to the weapon's limited caliber, the explosion radius is not large. However, the effect is sufficient to turn the enemies' numerical superiority to their disadvantage.
advantages: Radius of maximum area damage = 3 m
Radius of the average area of ​​damage = 6 m
Radius of minimum area damage = 9 m
Radius of critical area damage = 3 m
disadvantages: The blast radius damage can cause self-damage
descriptionZh: 普通射击可以同时对多个目标造成伤害。由于武器口径有限，爆炸半径不大。然而，其效果足以将敌人的数量优势变为劣势。

name: Incendiary Charge
description: Critical hits set the target on fire.
advantages: Critically hit enemies are heated up by +0.4
descriptionZh: 致命一击会使目标着火。

name: Jamming Charge
description: A successful hit disables the target's Overdrive and Drone advantages.
advantages: Applies the Jammer status effect to hit enemies for 4.5 seconds.
descriptionZh: 成功命中会禁用目标的超速驾驶和无人机优势。

name: Lightning Charge
description: Critical hits disable the target's supplies.
advantages: When enemies are hit critically , the EMP status effect is activated for 2 seconds.
descriptionZh: 重击会使目标的补给失效。

name: Manual Firing Mode
description: Automatic firing from the second barrel is disabled. In this mode, the firing controls function just like those of any other weapon. Handy if you prefer not to change your habits.
descriptionZh: 第二个枪管的自动射击被禁用。在这种模式下，射击控制功能就像任何其他武器一样。如果您不想改变习惯，这很方便。

name: Phoenix
description: Only tankers who keep rising like a phoenix from the ashes again and again to achieve their goal deserve this weapon. A secret augment. Earn 5 000 000 reputation points using the Tsunami turret to get it.
descriptionZh: 只有那些像凤凰一样浴火重生、一次次实现目标的坦克手才配得上这把武器。秘密增强。使用海啸炮塔获得 5 000 000 声望点即可获得它。

name: Piercing Shells
description: Critical hits disable the target's protection.
advantages: For critically hit enemies, the Armor-Piercing status effect is activated for 5 seconds.
descriptionZh: 重击会使目标的保护失效。

name: Pulsar
description: An augment made with irreproducible technology. A critical hit generates a quantum vortex that applies several effects at the same time, usually negative ones. Scientists managed to decrease critical damage, but it was not enough to salvage the situation — an enemy will still be sorely defeated once struck. The inventor of the technology is on the international most wanted list.
advantages: Hitting an enemy with a critical shot will apply the following status effects: Jammer : 5 sec Electromagnetic Pulse : 2 sec Stun : 1.5 sec Armor-Piercing : 9 sec

name: Shock Shells
description: Critical hits stun the target.
advantages: When enemies are hit critically , the Stun status effect is activated for 1 second.
descriptionZh: 致命一击会使目标昏迷。

name: Tungsten Charge
description: Normal shots ricochet more effectively. Through the skillful use of this ammunition charge, a situational advantage can be transformed into a decisive one.
descriptionZh: 普通射击弹跳更有效。通过巧妙地运用这​​种弹药冲锋，可以将态势优势转化为决定性优势。

name: Adrenaline

Adds a spare battery for the enhanced damage modulator, activated only in extreme circumstances when the tank's hull is critically damaged. Powering the damage modulator from two energy sources is unsafe — it may explode. The requirement to activate it only during severe damage likely exists to avoid warranty claims.
disadvantages: Damage bonus only activates when health is ≤25%
Effect is disabled when the tank has the Freezing status effect.

This system safely boosts turret damage beyond the modulator’s standard capabilities, but only if the tank’s structural integrity remains intact. If the AI detects that the hull has been compromised, the spare battery will immediately shut down — all to prevent warranty claims, of course.
disadvantages: Damage boost is active only while you have at least 85% of your maximum HP.
Effect is disabled when the tank has the Freezing status effect.

name: Cryotron
description: Replaces the default plasma charges with Cryo capsules. On detonation, the critically low temperature allows you to not only deal damage but also freeze a target. However, critical damage is decreased.
advantages: Critical hits decrease the target's temperature by -1.0
descriptionZh: 用冷冻胶囊取代默认的等离子电荷。爆炸时，极低的温度不仅可以造成伤害，还可以冻结目标。然而，暴击伤害会减少。

name: Excelsior
description: Enhances key turret or hull parameters without introducing new functions. This premium augment is the result of a breakthrough research program integrating diamond crystals into the turret’s design. Diamond-coated barrel lining increases operational pressure during fire. Diamond bearings enhance turret’s rotation efficiency. Diamond semiconductors boost the targeting system’s computational performance. The only downside? Its stunning craftsmanship remains hidden from view inside the turret.
descriptionZh: 在不引入新功能的情况下增强关键炮塔或车体参数。这种高级增强是一项突破性研究计划的结果，该计划将金刚石晶体融入到炮塔的设计中。金刚石涂层枪管内衬增加了火灾期间的操作压力。金刚石轴承提高了刀塔的旋转效率。金刚石半导体提高了瞄准系统的计算性能。唯一的缺点？其令人惊叹的工艺仍然隐藏在炮塔内。

name: Heavy Plasmagun
description: Regular and critical damage are increased. Projectile speed and range of fire are decreased. Turret modification in the tradition of the famous BFG. Fires big powerful balls of plasma, which negatively affects projectile speed and range of fire, but deal more damage. Be cautious of the self-damage from splash!
descriptionZh: 常规伤害和严重伤害都会增加。射弹速度和射程降低。炮塔改装继承了著名的 BFG 的传统。发射强大的等离子球，这会对射弹速度和射程产生负面影响，但会造成更多伤害。小心溅水造成的自伤！

name: Magnetron
description: The use of high-tech vortex plasma allows you to "blow" supply effects away from an opponent. However, critical damage is decreased.
advantages: Critical hits activate the Electromagnetic Pulse status effect for 1 second
descriptionZh: 使用高科技涡流等离子体可以让你将补给效应“吹”离对手。然而，暴击伤害会减少。

name: Phoenix
description: Only tankers who keep rising like a phoenix from the ashes again and again to achieve their goal deserve this weapon. A secret augment. Earn 5 000 000 reputation points using the Twins turret to get it.
descriptionZh: 只有那些像凤凰一样浴火重生、一次次实现目标的坦克手才配得上这把武器。秘密增强。使用 Twins 炮塔获得 5 000 000 声望点即可获得它。

name: Plasma Accelerators
description: Range of fire and projectile acceleration are increased, but reload takes a bit more time. Changing settings of plasma accelerators allows to be at a safer distance from the enemy in battle. Projectiles accelerates faster and fly further, but the fire rate is reduced.
descriptionZh: 射程和射弹加速度增加，但装弹需要更多时间。改变等离子加速器的设置可以在战斗中与敌人保持更安全的距离。射弹加速更快、飞得更远，但射速降低。

name: Plasma Disruptor
description: Improved plasma accelerators block the target's drone and overdrive controls. Keep bombarding the target with critical plasma and you need not be afraid of your opponent's overdrive and drone. However, critical damage is decreased.
advantages: Critically hitting an enemy activates the Jammer status effect for 3 second
descriptionZh: 改进的等离子加速器阻止目标的无人机和超速控制。继续用临界等离子轰击目标，你不必害怕对手的超速驾驶和无人机。然而，暴击伤害会减少。

name: Plasma Injector
description: A controllable magnetic field lets you direct the plasma explosion energy straight into a tank's armor. Sometimes it completely destroys its protective properties. However, critical damage is decreased.
advantages: Critically hitting an enemy applies the Armor-Piercing status effect to them for 1.5 second.
descriptionZh: 可控磁场可让您将等离子爆炸能量直接导入坦克装甲。有时它会完全破坏其保护性能。然而，暴击伤害会减少。

name: Plasma Turbo Accelerators
description: Initial projectile speed and range of fire are increased. However, damage, impact force, and recoil are decreased, while reload takes a bit more time. High-quality plasma generators and calibrated superconducting magnets let you furiously bombard your opponents with plasma. Damage and impact force are reduced, but it is more than offset by the increased range and rate of fire, while the reduced recoil allows for more precise aiming.
descriptionZh: 初始射弹速度和射程增加。然而，伤害、冲击力和后坐力都会降低，而装弹需要更多的时间。高品质等离子发生器和经过校准的超导磁铁让您可以用等离子猛烈轰击对手。伤害和冲击力有所降低，但射程和射速的增加足以抵消这一影响，而后坐力的降低则可以实现更精确的瞄准。

name: Plasmatron
description: Plasma balls have higher initial projectile speed and deal a lot of damage. However, recharge time between launched plasma balls is greatly increased. This augment implements chemical processes into shooting that slow down plasma generation using a revolutionary substance based on inhibitors. Firepower of each shot becomes stronger due to thorough generation of plasma shells and increased saturation with a secret chemical compound.
descriptionZh: 等离子球具有更高的初始射弹速度并造成大量伤害。然而，发射的等离子球之间的充电时间大大增加。这种增强在射击中实施了化学过程，使用基于抑制剂的革命性物质减缓等离子体的产生。由于等离子炮弹的彻底生成和秘密化合物的饱和度增加，每次射击的火力都变得更强。

name: Pulsar
description: An augment made with irreproducible technology. A critical hit generates a quantum vortex that applies several effects at the same time, usually negative ones. Scientists managed to decrease critical damage, but it was not enough to salvage the situation — an enemy will still be sorely defeated once struck. The inventor of the technology is on the international most wanted list.
advantages: Hitting an enemy with a critical shot will apply the following status effects: Jammer : 1 sec Electromagnetic Pulse : 1 sec Stun : 0.4 sec Armor-Piercing : 1.5 sec
descriptionZh: 用不可复制的技术制成的增强体。致命一击会产生量子漩涡，同时产生多种效果，通常是负面效果。科学家们设法减少了致命伤害，但这还不足以挽救局面——敌人一旦被击中，仍然会被惨败。该技术的发明者名列国际通缉名单上。

name: Stabilized Plasma
description: Shots of stabilized plasma keep their form better and do not explode upon hitting a tank or an obstacle. Such shots can't deal splash- and self-damage.
descriptionZh: 稳定的等离子射击可以更好地保持其形状，并且在击中坦克或障碍物时不会爆炸。此类射击无法造成溅射和自伤。

name: Tectonic Plasma
description: The most ruthless version of the turret. Critical plasma charges apply the «Stun» status effect upon hitting targets, but critical damage is decreased. Opponents will be raging!
advantages: Critical hits Stun the enemy for 0.4 seconds
descriptionZh: 最狠的炮塔版本。临界等离子电荷在击中目标时会产生“眩晕”状态效果，但临界伤害会降低。对手将会怒火中烧！

name: Tempest
description: Increased critical damage chance and shell impact force. Plasma shell speed is significantly reduced but gradually increases after firing. An upgraded version of the Heavy Plasmagun. Plasma shells become even deadlier and slower. To maintain effectiveness, the plasma harnesses natural magnetic fields for gradual acceleration. This behavior demands exceptional skill from the gunner. Always aim ahead of targets or engage at dangerously close range — otherwise, enemies will easily dodge these lethal plasma shells. Only those who sow the wind can unleash a storm upon their enemies!
descriptionZh: 增加暴击伤害几率和炮弹冲击力。等离子炮弹速度显着降低，但在发射后逐渐增加。重型等离子枪的升级版。等离子炮弹变得更加致命和缓慢。为了保持有效性，等离子体利用自然磁场逐渐加速。这种行为需要枪手具有非凡的技能。始终瞄准目标前方或在危险的近距离交战——否则，敌人会轻易躲避这些致命的等离子炮弹。只有播种风的人才能向敌人发动风暴！

name: Vaporizer
description: A decrease in plasma temperature leads to the plasma not being detonated when hitting a target. However, plasma remnants may ignite the target, but critical damage is decreased.
advantages: Critical hits increase the target's temperature by +0.4
descriptionZh: 等离子体温度的降低导致等离子体在击中目标时不会被引爆。然而，等离子残余物可能会点燃目标，但临界伤害会降低。

name: Adrenaline
description: Increases turret damage when the tank is severely damaged. Adds a spare battery for the enhanced damage modulator, activated only in extreme circumstances when the tank's hull is critically damaged. Powering the damage modulator from two energy sources is unsafe — it may explode. The requirement to activate it only during severe damage likely exists to avoid warranty claims.
disadvantages: Damage bonus only activates when health is ≤25%
Effect is disabled when the tank has the Freezing status effect.
descriptionZh: 当坦克严重受损时，会增加炮塔伤害。为增强型伤害调制器添加备用电池，仅在坦克车体严重损坏的极端情况下激活。使用两种能源为损伤调制器供电是不安全的——它可能会爆炸。仅在严重损坏时才激活它的要求可能是为了避免保修索赔。

name: Armor-Piercing Band
description: Critical damage applies the «Armor-Piercing» status effect to the enemy tank. This modern version of a machine gun with cumulative bullets lets you deactivate the armor amplifiers equipped on your opponent's tank, leaving them almost without armor!
advantages: Critically hitting the enemy activates the Armor-Piercing status effect for 1.5 seconds.
descriptionZh: 暴击伤害会对敌方坦克施加“穿甲”状态效果。这种带有累积子弹的现代版本机枪可以让您停用对手坦克上配备的装甲放大器，使他们几乎没有装甲！

name: Camper
description: Increases turret damage when the tank has minimal damage. A spare battery for the enhanced damage modulator, connected in parallel to the primary power source via an AI-controlled management system. This system safely boosts turret damage beyond the modulator’s standard capabilities, but only if the tank’s structural integrity remains intact. If the AI detects that the hull has been compromised, the spare battery will immediately shut down — all to prevent warranty claims, of course.
disadvantages: Damage boost is active only while you have at least 85% of your maximum HP.
Effect is disabled when the tank has the Freezing status effect.
descriptionZh: 当坦克伤害最小时增加炮塔伤害。用于增强型损伤调制器的备用电池，通过人工智能控制的管理系统并联到主电源。该系统可以安全地提高炮塔损坏程度，使其超出调制器的标准能力，但前提是坦克的结构完整性保持完好。如果人工智能检测到船体受到损害，备用电池将立即关闭——当然，所有这些都是为了防止保修索赔。

name: Excelsior
description: Enhances key turret or hull parameters without introducing new functions. This premium augment is the result of a breakthrough research program integrating diamond crystals into the turret’s design. Diamond-coated barrel lining increases operational pressure during fire. Diamond bearings enhance turret’s rotation efficiency. Diamond semiconductors boost the targeting system’s computational performance. The only downside? Its stunning craftsmanship remains hidden from view inside the turret.
descriptionZh: 在不引入新功能的情况下增强关键炮塔或车体参数。这种高级增强是一项突破性研究计划的结果，该计划将金刚石晶体融入到炮塔的设计中。金刚石涂层枪管内衬增加了火灾期间的操作压力。金刚石轴承提高了刀塔的旋转效率。金刚石半导体提高了瞄准系统的计算性能。唯一的缺点？其令人惊叹的工艺仍然隐藏在炮塔内。

name: Explosive Band
description: Splash damage is added. Damage is increased, minimum ricochet angle is decreased. A version of machine gun filled with explosive bullets. It deals damage not only to the first target, but also to surrounding enemies increasing the chances of victory. Better bouncing settings of bullets lets you "feel" an enemy behind an obstacle with its shrapnel damage. Use this tactical element in combat to weaken or destroy your opponents.
advantages: Splash damage added: Damage at 2m: 100% Damage at 4m: 50% Damage at 6m (outer radius): 50% Critical damage at 4m: 100%
descriptionZh: 增加了溅射伤害。伤害增加，最小跳弹角度减小。装有爆炸性子弹的机枪版本。它不仅对第一个目标造成伤害，还会对周围的敌人造成伤害，增加胜利的机会。更好的子弹弹跳设置可以让你“感觉到”障碍物后面的敌人及其弹片伤害。在战斗中使用这种战术元素来削弱或摧毁你的对手。

name: Freezing Band
description: The critical damage inflicts the "Freeze" status effect on the enemy. This modern version of a machine gun with freezing bullets lets you slow down the movement of the enemy on the battlefield with critical damage, and also almost weld their turret to the hull for some time. In return, you will have to sacrifice the amount of critical damage.
advantages: Critical damage imposes Freezing status effect on an enemy tank for 5 seconds.
descriptionZh: 暴击伤害对敌人造成“冻结”状态效果。这种带有冰冻子弹的现代版机枪可以让你在战场上减慢敌人的移动速度并造成严重伤害，并且在一段时间内几乎将他们的炮塔焊接到车体上。作为回报，你将不得不牺牲一定程度的暴击伤害。

name: Incendiary Band
description: A modification for fans of spraying enemies with non-stop bullets. While overheating from continuous fire, these rounds heat up and ignite the target, but the user's resistance to overheating is reduced, meaning they will overheat faster.
advantages: Each bullet that hits an enemy while your own tank is under the Burning status effect will increase their temperature by +0.07
descriptionZh: 针对用不间断子弹向敌人喷射的粉丝进行的修改。当连续射击导致过热时，这些子弹会升温并点燃目标，但使用者对过热的抵抗力会降低，这意味着他们会更快过热。

name: Jamming Band
description: This modern version of a machine gun with high-tech stuffing lets you disable the usage of overdrives and drones with critical hits, thereby destroying the opponent’s plans both in attack and in defense!
advantages: Critically hitting the enemy activates the Jammer status effect for 3 seconds.
descriptionZh: 这款带有高科技填充物的现代版机枪可让您禁用超速驾驶和无人机的重击，从而摧毁对手的攻击和防御计划！

name: Large Caliber
description: Damage, recoil, and impact force are increased. Barrel startup and slowdown time are decreased. Reload takes a bit more time. A heavy artillery modification. It takes longer to rotate, but once an enemy is caught in your hail of bullets, the consequences are unavoidable. Each successful hit is a real challenge for the enemy’s fortitude. To prevent you from getting tired of destroying enemies, we've increased the reload time for a new ammo belt, giving you a chance to stretch before pulling the trigger again.
descriptionZh: 伤害、后坐力和冲击力都会增加。枪管启动和减速时间减少。重新加载需要更多时间。重型火炮改装。旋转需要更长的时间，但一旦敌人陷入你的枪林弹雨中，后果就不可避免。每一次成功的打击都是对敌人毅力的真正挑战。为了防止你厌倦消灭敌人，我们增加了新弹药带的装弹时间，让你有机会在再次扣动扳机之前伸展一下身体。

name: Magnetic Band
description: Critical damage applies the «EMP» status effect to the enemy tank. This modern version of a machine gun with cumulative bullets causes a brief shutdown of the enemy tanks' electronics, disables and blocks the use of supplies for a while, making the enemy slow, safe and a vulnerable target!
advantages: Critically hitting the enemy activates the Electromagnetic Pulse status effect for 1 second.
descriptionZh: 暴击伤害会对敌方坦克施加“EMP”状态效果。这种带有累积子弹的现代机枪会导致敌方坦克的电子设备短暂关闭，暂时禁用和阻止补给的使用，使敌人变得缓慢、安全并成为脆弱的目标！

name: Phoenix
description: Only tankers who keep rising like a phoenix from the ashes again and again to achieve their goal deserve this weapon. A secret augment. Earn 5 000 000 reputation points using the Vulcan turret to get it.
descriptionZh: 只有那些像凤凰一样浴火重生、一次次实现目标的坦克手才配得上这把武器。秘密增强。使用 Vulcan 炮塔获得 5 000 000 声望点来获得它。

name: Pulsar
description: An augment made with irreproducible technology. A critical hit generates a quantum vortex that applies several effects at the same time, usually negative ones. Scientists managed to decrease critical damage and critical chance, but it was not enough to salvage the situation — an enemy will still be sorely defeated once struck. The inventor of the technology is on the international most wanted list.
advantages: Hitting an enemy with a critical shot will apply the following status effects: Jammer : 3 sec Electromagnetic Pulse : 1 sec Stun : 0.4 sec Armor-Piercing : 1.5 sec
descriptionZh: 用不可复制的技术制成的增强体。致命一击会产生量子漩涡，同时产生多种效果，通常是负面效果。科学家们设法降低了暴击伤害和暴击几率，但这还不足以挽救局面——敌人一旦被击中，仍然会被惨败。该技术的发明者名列国际通缉名单上。

name: Reinforced Aiming Transmission
description: Optimization of the aiming transmission for a faster horizontal aim. Due to optimization, vertical aiming transmission is less effective.
advantages: Coefficient of turret rotation slowdown while shooting: -50%
descriptionZh: 优化瞄准传输以实现更快的水平瞄准。由于优化，垂直瞄准传输效果较差。

name: Rubberized Rounds
description: Maximum number of projectile bounces is increased. Minimum ricochet angle is decreased. These rubber-encased shells significantly increase bounce probability and number of ricochets when firing. This enables you to attack your enemies from unexpected positions and easily mislead them. Please refrain from using allies as cover for shooting.
descriptionZh: 射弹弹跳的最大数量增加。最小跳弹角减小。这些橡胶包裹的炮弹显着增加了射击时的弹跳概率和跳弹数量。这使您能够从意想不到的位置攻击敌人并轻松误导他们。请不要利用盟友作为掩护进行射击。

name: Shooting Speed Regulator
description: Damage and critical hit chance are increased. Reload takes a bit more time. Barrel startup and slowdown time are decreased. Decreased firing speed allows for the barrels to cool down better, increasing damage and critical hit chance. The barrels wind up and wind down faster. This configuration increases tactical flexibility of the weapon and allows for longer uninterrupted fire.
descriptionZh: 伤害和暴击率增加。重新加载需要更多时间。枪管启动和减速时间减少。降低射击速度可以使枪管更好地冷却，从而增加伤害和暴击几率。桶上紧和下紧的速度更快。这种配置增加了武器的战术灵活性，并允许更长时间的不间断射击。

name: Shredder
description: Increased rate of fire, range of fire, and damage. In exchange, barrel startup and slowdown time are increased, and the turret is tightly welded to the hull during firing. You can still control the direction of fire by moving your hull. Destroy an opponent? That's easy! Due to its increased firing rate and damage, you simply grind tanks with this augment like shredder cuts the office papers into particles. It saws enemies like an industrial chainsaw. Opponents will simply have no chance to face you on the battlefield.
descriptionZh: 提高射速、射程和伤害。作为交换，枪管启动和减速时间增加，并且炮塔在射击时与车体紧密焊接。您仍然可以通过移动船体来控制火力方向。消灭对手？这很容易！由于其射速和伤害增加，你只需用这种增强装置研磨坦克，就像碎纸机将办公文件切成颗粒一样。它像工业电锯一样看到敌人。对手根本没有机会在战场上与你面对面。

name: Stunning Band
description: Critical damage applies the «Stun» status effect to the enemy tank. This modern version of a machine gun with ultrasonic bullets lets you disorient the enemy in space, immobilizing them and leaving them unable to shoot, activate overdrives and supplies, or self-destruct for some time.
advantages: Critical damage imposes Status Effect «Stun» on an enemy tank Critical stun: =0.4 sec
descriptionZh: 暴击伤害会对敌方坦克施加“眩晕”状态效果。这种带有超声波子弹的现代机枪可以让你在太空中迷惑敌人，使他们无法动弹，并让他们在一段时间内无法射击、激活超速装置和补给，或者自毁。
